    2026 Adobe Analytics Rockstars — Top Tips and Tricks [S101]

    , Adobe Evangelist, Adobe

    , Sr. eCommerce Analyst, Staples Canada

    , Senior Consultant, Platform Analytics, BlastX Consulting

    , Senior Analytics Manager, KeyBank

    , Head, Digital Experience & Intelligence, Xerago

    Hear from customers of both Adobe Analytics and Adobe Customer Journey Analytics on their amazing tips, tricks, and power strategies. Add them to your playlist to positively impact your business. If you’re looking to deepen your analytics repertoire and become your company’s very own analytics virtuoso, don’t miss this session. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • Innovative practices and strategies to get your digital assets singing 
    • Out-of-the-box thinking on data analysis to optimize your business results 
    • Real-world tips and tricks that address challenging analytics questions

    Brian Gates
    4:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    2026 Playbook: Scaling Field Marketing and Event Orchestration [S722]

    , EVP, Growth & Strategy, RainFocus

    , VP Platform Strategy & AI, RainFocus

    Scaling a global event strategy requires repeatable logistics, as well as intelligent orchestration that bridges the gap between planning and performance. Explore how Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Marketo Engage, and Adobe Experience Platform can transform event experiences from siloed activations into structured, data-rich moments within your marketing ecosystem. Get a blueprint for automating the end-to-end event lifecycle, powering personalized attendee journeys and delivering measurable global impact.

    Key takeaways:

    • See how Adobe Workfront centralizes event requests, ensuring that every activation, from webinars to flagship conferences, is built on a consistent data and governance strategy
    • Learn how integrating Experience Manager Assets and using Workfront Fusion eliminates manual friction
    • Explore how event intelligence fuels Adobe Real-Time CDP and Adobe B2B Journey Optimizer to create sophisticated buying groups and deliver next-best experiences

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with RainFocus for marketing purposes.

    Track: Workflow and Planning, B2B Customer Journeys, Content Supply Chain for the AI World

    11:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    2026 Trends in AI and Customer Experience [S815]

    , VP, Enterprise Marketing – Solution Marketing and Evangelism, Adobe

    , Sr. Editor, Thought Leadership, Oxford Economics

    , VP Digital Engineering, Virgin Atlantic

    , Director, Adobe Digital Insights, Adobe

    Customer expectations have evolved, and there are new pathways to content and brand discovery. Organizations are in a frenzy to redefine what meaningful experience looks like in an AI-driven world. Comfort with AI — both from customers and employees — is quickly becoming a leading indicator of how future interactions will take shape.

    Learn from Adobe’s Adam Justis and Vivek Pandya and Oxford Economics' Sundus Alfi as they unveil the top 2026 AI and customer experience trends shaping this new era. Then join us in conversation with Neil Letchford from Virgin Atlantic on how they are leveraging AI to deliver hyper-personalized experiences that feel human, authentic, and trust-driven. 

    Join this session to:
    •    Learn how customer demands have changed, attention is shrinking, and comfort with AI is evolving. Then discover what it means for marketers and CX leaders in the year ahead.
    •    Explore how organizations are finding measurable improvements in generative AI and are ambitiously building the next frontier in agentic AI
    •    Stay ahead of the curve and discover how you and your brand can lead the next wave of innovation

    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Not Product-Specific
    • Monday, Apr 2011:30 AM - 12:30 PM PDT
      (Tuesday, Apr 2112:00 AM - 1:00 AM IST)
      In-Person

    3 - 2 - 1 - LAUNCH! Project Halo Revealed [S232]

    , Strategy and Business Development, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Strap in — the future of marketing is officially taking off! Don't miss this hands-on reveal of the highly anticipated Project Halo, Adobe’s newest AI-first product coming out of stealth mode. Project Halo propels martech into a new dimension, where audiences assemble instantly and campaigns launch at warp speed. This pioneering mission replaces manual effort with a simpler, prompt-based approach to building marketing campaigns. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • See a live demo of how Project Halo generates campaigns
    • Learn how AI is making advancements in marketing
    • Join a Q&A on the evolution of LLMs and agents experiences
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys

    Monday, Apr 20
    3 Ways to Grow Revenue with Agentic AI Orchestration [S712]

    , Vice President Engineering, Fidelity Investments

    , Partner, EMEA Marketing Transformation Lead & Client Partner, IBM

    , VP Consumer Products, Retail and Luxury, IBM

    CMOs face unprecedented pressure to deliver measurable revenue growth, with 58% of marketing leaders citing it as their top priority in 2025. Achieving this requires moving beyond fragmented MarTech toward end-to-end AI-driven orchestration that enables always-on engagement.

    Join this session with IBM & Fidelity Investments to explore how evolving consumer engagement with technology is driving a shift from MarTech to RevTech and unlocking new business growth with perspectives from consumer thought-leader & LinkedIn Top Voice Elaine Parr.

    In this session you’ll learn:

    • Why consumer behaviour is accelerating the shift from MarTech to RevTech
    • How agentic AI enables real-time, continuous experience orchestration
    • How to approach this from the perspective of regulated industry and 'no regret's decision-making'
    • How unified platforms can increase loyalty, trust and measurable revenue impact


    Register to discover how AI-powered experience orchestration is redefining the future of marketing and growth.

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with IBM for marketing purposes.

    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents

    Alexis Zamkow
    1:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    5 Lessons for Scaling an Agentic AI–powered Marketing Operating Model [S711]

    , VP Transformation and Operations Marketing, Communications and CSR, IBM

    , VP, Sr. Partner, Global Marketing Offering Leader, IBM

    , Distinguished Engineer, watsonx Solutions Engineering CoE & Adobe Partnership, IBM

    CMOs are moving beyond isolated generative AI pilots and toward something far more ambitious: re-architecting their operating model for agentic AI. The question is no longer if AI will transform marketing, but how to scale it responsibly, systematically, and with measurable impact. To succeed, brands need a clear vision and a pragmatic roadmap for how agentic AI will reshape workflows, elevate decision-making, and deliver truly personalized customer experiences at scale. IBM Marketing is living this transformation in real time.

    This session highlights IBM Marketing’s firsthand journey in redesigning their marketing operating model—including a roadmap to agentify more than 70% of core marketing workflows. You’ll get an inside look at how agentic AI can be embedded at the foundation of marketing to create an intelligent, adaptive system that drives real business outcomes.

    In this session, you will:

    • Discover where agentic AI delivers the greatest business value—from faster, smarter strategic decisions to new levels of creative and operational agility.
    • Learn the leadership, governance, and risk-management playbook required to operationalize autonomous AI in a compliant, brand-safe way.
    • Gain practical guidance on redesigning talent, workflows, and measurement so agentic AI becomes a durable growth engine—not just another technology investment.

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with IBM for marketing purposes.

    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    3:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    5x AI Citations. Faster Launches. The New Playbook for Brand Visibility. [S854]

    , Principal Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Head of Commeralisation, Digital Capability and Performance, Qantas

    Your content is working at half capacity. It was built for humans — for browsers, clicks, and search results. But AI systems are now the first stop in your customer’s journey, and they’re reading, parsing, and citing your content before a visit ever happens. If your site isn’t structured for both audiences, you're invisible to one of them. Hear how Qantas made the foundation decision that changed everything, and explore Adobe’s vision for where this is headed. See how Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Sites Optimizer, LLM Optimizer, and Brand Concierge connect into one unified system for brand visibility and produce 5x increases in AI citations, faster time to market, and on-property conversations that keep customers on your brand, not someone else’s.

    Key takeaways:

    • Why your content isn’t working at full capacity, and what it takes to serve both human and AI audiences
    • How leading enterprises are connecting content foundation, optimization, and conversational engagement into one system
    • What real results look like: AI citation gains, launch velocity, and brand trust at scale
    Track: Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator
    • Tuesday, Apr 213:00 PM - 4:00 PM PDT
      (Wednesday, Apr 223:30 AM - 4:30 AM IST)
      In-Person

    Peter Kulupka
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    3:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    A Bank's Blueprint for Agile Marketing and AI-Powered Experiences [S729]

    , VP, Head of Adobe Practice, Acxiom

    , Head of MarTech & Digital Transformation, Citi

    For a global financial institution, it started with mapping out the key marketing and business outcomes that map back to key data and technology deliverables. Join Citi and Acxiom as they share how this transformation took shape. With customer experience at the center, the team focused on enabling more relevant, timely interactions while simplifying operations behind the scenes. In this session, you will learn how to:

    • Prioritize use cases that show immediate ROI and unlock future investment
    • Develop target state architecture that stitches the key platforms that deliver optimized outcomes
    • Structure transformation into clear workstreams that align teams and drive accountability
    • Create a scalable foundation for AI-driven marketing
    • Build the operational foundation for personalization and omnichannel engagement
    • Simplify workflows and connect systems to improve speed and execution

    This session focuses on what worked, what delivered value early, and how a strong partnership helped move transformation forward.

     

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Acxiom/Omnicom for marketing purposes.

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    AbbVie Transforms Enrollment Experience with Adobe Experience Manager Forms [S329]

    , Sr Product Marketing Manager - AEM Forms, Adobe

    , Chief Architect, AbbVie

    , Associate Director, Web Platforms, AbbVie

    Life sciences organizations must balance global scale, regulatory compliance, and the need for seamless patient and provider experiences. Yet, many still rely on legacy forms solutions that are difficult to author, hard to integrate, and costly to scale. AbbVie shares how it took a modern approach to digital enrollment using Adobe Experience Manager Forms to power patient services, provider interactions, and internal workflows across the enterprise.

    Key takeaways:

    • How AbbVie simplified form authoring and created intuitive, guided experiences by leveraging Adobe Experience Manager as a Cloud Service
    • AbbVie’s vision for the future, including how agentic AI capabilities can accelerate form development and reduce authoring time
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Forms

    Accelerate Expansion and Conversion with Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service [S302]

    , Director of Product Management, Adobe Commerce, Adobe

    , Innovation and Marketing Technology Manager, Fountain Tire

    Discover how leading brands are driving measurable business growth with Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service—a composable, cloud-native platform. In this session, you'll learn how Fountain Tire modernized its commerce foundation and storefront with Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service, aligning digital transformation with a broader ERP initiative across 170 locations. Adobe experts will also share how our full-stack platform, powered by agentic AI, helps boost conversion and accelerate expansion.

    Key Takeaways:

    • From core commerce to AI-powered merchandising and services like Adobe Commerce Optimizer, learn how each delivers incremental value without requiring a complete platform overhaul.
    • Learn how brands use our composable stack for faster launches, richer personalization, and new revenue opportunities.
    • Explore how embedded AI and agentic capabilities, including Adobe Commerce Optimizer's intelligent catalog optimization, are helping merchants drive sustained growth.

    Accelerate Marketing Content with Acrobat and Adobe Express [L422]

    , Principal Business Solutions Technologist, Adobe

    Move faster from insight to execution. Explore how AI-powered Acrobat Studio works seamlessly with Adobe Express to simplify and accelerate every stage of the content workflow. Learn how to chat with Acrobat to quickly edit PDFs, extract key insights, summarize complex documents, and ensure that your content is clear, accurate, and ready to share. Through guided, real-world exercises, see how Acrobat goes beyond basic edits to help you understand and refine content, identifying key messages and repurposing assets with confidence. Then bring those insights into Adobe Express to create on-brand presentations, social graphics, and marketing materials in minutes. By the end of the lab, you’ll know how to connect document intelligence with fast, flexible design to streamline collaboration, stay on brand, and deliver high-impact marketing content at speed.

    Key takeaways:

    • Use AI-powered Acrobat chat to edit, summarize, and understand marketing content faster
    • Turn PDFs and insights into on-brand presentations and assets with Adobe Express
    • Streamline marketing workflows by connecting document intelligence with creative production
    Track: Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Document Cloud, Adobe Express, Adobe Acrobat Studio

    Accelerate Marketing Workflows with AI Assistant and Agent Orchestrator [L815]

    , Senior AI Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Learn how to use Adobe Experience Platform AI Assistant, powered by Agent Orchestrator, to simplify, accelerate, and improve the quality of core marketing workflows across Adobe Experience Platform and Experience Cloud applications. Gain practical experience using AI Assistant and specialized agents to translate business goals into execution across audience creation, journey design, insights analysis, and ongoing optimization.

    Accelerate Review and Approval with Workfront and Frame.io [L410]

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    Are review and approval bottlenecks slowing you down? Discover how a unified, end‑to‑end review and approval experience brings humans and AI together across the entire content supply chain. Built on a common storage layer, this connected workflow merges work management and content review into one seamless process. From kickoff to final approval, see how AI-powered automation handles repetitive, time‑consuming tasks while empowering your team to stay firmly in control of creative and strategic decisions.  

    Key takeaways: 

    • Review and collaborate in Frame.io with intelligent context and markup 
    • Accelerate multi‑stage approvals in Adobe Workfront with automated and flexible routing and clear decision tracking
    • Automate delivery of approved assets to Adobe Experience Manager Assets with consistent metadata for intelligent reuse and downstream AI applications 
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World

    Accelerating B2B Marketing with AI Using Journey and Audience Agents [L222]

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Business Consultant, Adobe

    AI accelerates B2B journey design and audience creation only when guided by clear strategy, effective prompts, and strong governance. Learn how to use Journey and Audience agents in Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition to increase speed and efficiency while maintaining quality, accuracy, and alignment with your go-to-market framework. Practice crafting effective prompts, reviewing and refining agent-generated journeys and audiences, and applying guardrails that keep outputs accurate and brand-safe. Compare manual and agent-assisted workflows to understand when automation adds value and where human judgment remains essential. Explore techniques for iterating quickly without sacrificing control or strategic intent. Leave with practical prompting patterns, review checklists, and repeatable workflows that help teams blend human expertise with AI to scale B2B programs faster and with greater confidence. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • Create effective prompts that improve AI-generated journeys and audiences 
    • Apply review and governance checks to maintain quality and brand safety 
    • Balance automation and human oversight to scale B2B execution efficiently 
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition

    Accelerating Enterprise Agility and Content Velocity in Life Sciences [S737]

    , Front End UI Engineer, AbbVie

    , Director Of Sales, Cognizant Moment

    In the highly regulated Life Sciences industry, balancing speed with compliance is the ultimate challenge. Get a firsthand look at how a global pharmaceutical leader is leveraging cloud-native content management to drive enterprise agility and faster execution as part of a broader digital transformation. Discover how cutting-edge AI capabilities are delivering measurable operational impact, accelerating the content supply chain, reducing costs, and enabling scalable AI adoption that directly supports long-term growth and revenue objectives. Explore the strategic application of AI to drive sustained competitive advantage while maintaining the highest standards of quality and trust.

    Key takeaways:

    • Transition to cloud-native architectures to enable global scalability and speed
    • Lead industry innovation by applying AI strategically and responsibly at scale
    • Balance rapid digital engagement with strict compliance and quality standards

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Cognizant for marketing purposes.

    Accelerating Sales with Real-Time Customer Engagement in Marketo Engage [OS218]

    , Director, Prudential Finance

    Adobe revolutionized its sales process by leveraging a multi-system, multi-product integration that drives real-time customer engagement. We’ll demonstrate how to harness the power of in-app events, real-time SMS notifications, and nurture email workflows to keep customers engaged and close deals faster with Adobe Marketo Engage. 

    Key takeaways:

    • Increase conversions with an integrated solution
    • Use real-time signals to trigger personalized SMS notifications and email workflows, ensuring timely and relevant customer interactions
    • Implement an automation model that streamlines the conversion process, ensuring consistent and timely customer interactions

    Wednesday, Apr 22
    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Accessibility at Scale: Global Regulations, Real Challenges, and What Works [S415]

    , Sr. Digital Product Operations Manager, Capital Group

    , Sr. Accessibility Trainer, Adobe Community Expert, Chax Training and Consulting

    Accessibility expert, Dax Castro, shares how organizations can navigate global accessibility regulations and turn compliance requirements into sustainable, scalable accessibility programs. Joined by Scott Wood, Sr. Digital Product Operations Manager at Capital Group, the discussion features real-world lessons from implementing enterprise accessibility initiatives, including resistance, missteps, and key leadership insights. Learn how Adobe accessibility solutions, including Adobe Acrobat and the AutoTag API, enable enterprise-scale, repeatable accessibility workflows that integrate with existing content operations and productivity tools.

    Key takeaways:

    • Phased accessibility implementation roadmap grounded in real-world decision-making and organizational experience
    • Guidance on how to start small, align stakeholders, and scale accessibility across content, brand, and workflows globally
    • How organizations balance compliance risk, operational realities, and inclusive brand goals while building repeatable processes
    Track: Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Creative Cloud, Adobe Document Cloud

    Adapt or Disappear: How Brands Win with AI-Powered Search [CP6]

    , Global Offering Leader, IBM

    Global consumer use of applications like ChatGPT has jumped 62% in just two years, signaling the arrival of agentic commerce. As AI search becomes the primary interface between consumers and brands, marketers must adapt to Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and how it reshapes brand visibility and mediates the entire purchase journey.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how to evolve your search, content, and brand strategies to stay visible as GEO reshapes discovery
    • Understand how to redesign customer acquisition models for an AI‑mediated purchase journey
    • Discover how to position brands so that AI gatekeepers consistently surface, prioritize, and recommend your content

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with IBM for marketing purposes.

    Track: Commerce, Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    Atanu Ghosh
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    10:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    A Day in the Life of an AI‑Ready Marketer: From Fragmentation to Flow [CP12]

    , Sr. Director, Microsoft

    Most marketing teams aren’t short on tools or ideas — they’re just navigating fragmented workflows. Briefs, audiences, content, execution, and insights often live in disconnected systems, creating friction that slows campaigns and limits impact. AI readiness isn’t about adding more technology. It’s about redesigning how work gets done. Microsoft and Adobe explore what it means to be AI‑ready in modern marketing. Using a “day in the life” lens, the discussion walks through how marketers can move from disconnected workflows to a more connected operating model where AI helps coordinate work, surface insights, and reduce the manual handoffs that consume time and attention. Learn how Microsoft Copilot and Adobe’s marketing agents work together to support key moments across the campaign lifecycle, from planning and audience strategy to content execution, journey management, and performance understanding, while keeping marketers in the flow of work that they already use every day. Rather than focusing on future promises, we’ll center in on practical value available today.

    Key takeaways:

    • Where AI can remove friction
    • How agents augment — not replace — human decision‑making
    • Which organizational shifts are required to unlock productivity gains

    Attendees will leave with a clearer framework for assessing AI readiness, prioritizing high‑impact use cases, and evolving marketing operations to support speed, personalization, and scale.

     

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Microsoft for marketing purposes.

    Track: Workflow and Planning, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    • Wednesday, Apr 2210:30 AM - 10:55 AM PDT
      (11:00 PM - 11:25 PM IST)
      In-Person

    Adobe Agentic Marketing Garage [S500]

    Experience League Agent, Adobe
    Adobe Firefly Services Agent, Adobe
    AEP/AEM Playground Agent, Adobe
    Content Compass Agent, Adobe
    Executive Assistant Agent, Adobe

     

    For the first time at Summit, not every presenter is human. The Adobe Agentic Marketing Garage is a live, innovation-only lab where attendees will get hands-on with AI agents to do real marketing work. With full reasoning visible on screen, the curtain is lifted to unlock the capabilities of this agent/human partnership. Bring your own agent or build one with our starter kit. Run it side-by-side against Adobe’s certified agents on a real brief. See where outputs converge, where they diverge, and why Adobe’s integration depth across creative, data, and activation changes the outcome. Nothing is scripted. Nothing is polished. That’s the point.

     

    Key takeaways:
    •    More than knowledge, get the plan to implement these capabilities in your own organization today 
    •    Human and Agent learning - your agent will be trained on how to unlock the power of agent-to-agent collaboration with Adobe.
    •    Build something real — run your agent against Adobe’s on a live marketing brief and see exactly where it wins, where it breaks, and what to fix next
     

    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Firefly

    Adobe Brand Concierge: Elevate Your Brand with Conversational Experiences [L816]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Senior Solution Architect, Adobe

    Consumers are increasingly seeking guidance from intelligent conversational third-party agents instead of engaging directly with your brand, leading to disintermediation, loss of control over the customer experience, and low visibility into customer interactions. Meet Adobe Brand Concierge — an AI-powered orchestration engine that helps B2C and B2B brands provide conversational experiences on their owned digital properties. In this hands-on lab, build, test, and deploy your first agentic concierge that restores relevance and elevates customer experiences on your websites.

    Key takeaways:

    • Configure AI agents with custom brand preferences
    • Integrate core capabilities, such as meeting booking for frictionless conversions, live chat handoffs for seamless support, and intent-driven sales routing to navigate behavioral paths
    • Test conversations with Concierge as a visitor and capture feedback
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Brand Concierge, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    Adobe Commerce in Action: Five Tips to Improve Customer Experience [CP18]

    , Sr. Principal, Product Management and Strategy, Adobe

    , Product Management- Adobe Commerce & Payments, Adobe

    In today’s competitive digital landscape, delivering a seamless and personalized commerce experience is essential to driving conversions and building customer loyalty. Join us for an engaging session where we’ll showcase five actionable tips to elevate your shopper experience using the combined power of Adobe Commerce and Adobe Experience Cloud solutions.

    Through live demos, you’ll see how these strategies come to life — from streamlining the customer journey to optimizing personalization and conversion. Whether you're a digital leader, marketer, or commerce strategist, this session will equip you with practical insights to transform your commerce experience.

    Key Takeaways:

    • Discover how Adobe Commerce and the Adobe Experience Cloud work together to create frictionless, personalized shopping journeys.
    • Learn five proven tactics to boost conversion rates and customer satisfaction.
    • See real-time demos that illustrate how to implement these tips effectively.

    Adobe Digital Twins: Making Every Product a Content Pipeline [L423]

    , Group product marketing manager, Adobe

    , Director of Engineering & Emerging Technology, Adobe

    See how pixel-perfect 3D digital twins are made accessible through an intuitive, easy-to-use UI to produce core product imagery and experiences for marketing needs without requiring 3D expertise. Work with a production-ready digital twin to generate photorealistic packshots, composite imagery, and product configurators using guided workflows. Learn how you can reuse a single 3D twin across various creative and marketing needs, including assets for e-commerce harmonized with new settings.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to reuse a single digital twin to produce packshots, composite imagery, and product configurators across channels
    • How camera angles, lighting, and variant controls embedded in a digital twin enhance what teams can adjust, and how to use pixel streaming to capture pixel-perfect outputs
    • How to create approved assets through an intuitive UI without touching 3D tools or code
    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise
    Product: Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Creative Production, Adobe Firefly Design Intelligence

    Adobe Experience Manager Rockstar -- 10th Anniversary [S330]

    , Director of Engineering, Adobe

    , Sr. Engineer, Adobe

    , AEM Functional Platform Lead, Accenture

    , CTO & Co-Founder, Indigo Dragons, Indigo Dragons

    , Solution Architect, Cognizant Netcentric

    Come celebrate 10 years of Experience Manager Rockstar! Root for the finalists of our global search as they take the stage to share their innovative tips, tricks, and strategies for content management and delivery in the age of AI. Each finalist has a few short minutes to tackle a real business challenge and showcase a live demo of how they’ve used Adobe Experience Manager and other Experience Cloud solutions to solve it. Get fresh approaches that blend AI experimentation with deep Experience Manager expertise.

    Come have a blast as we entertain and deepen your digital marketing and technical repertoire to become your company’s Experience Manager Rockstar. The winner, chosen by live audience voting, will be announced during the session. 

    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Experience Manager Forms

    11:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Adobe Experience Manager Sites Innovations in the AI Era [OS336]

    , Sr. Director, Product Management, Adobe

    , Sr. Dir, Strategy and Product Marketing, AEM and LLM Optimizer, Adobe

    We’ve entered the AI-first era, where experiences are no longer built only for people but also to be understood and acted on by agents. In this new landscape, your owned property is not just a destination — it’s the source of truth for humans and machines, powering discovery, engagement, and continuous improvement across every channel. Success in this new era means being machine-optimized as much as human-optimized. Your content must be structured, trusted, and agent-readable. Your operations must evolve from manual workflows to intelligent systems that can create, govern, and optimize in real time.

    Key takeaways:

    • Latest agentic innovations in Adobe Experience Manager to help you move faster and operate with trust
    • How to make every experience visible, consistent, and credible across both human and machine audiences
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Sites

      (11:30 PM - 11:45 PM IST)

    , Sr. Director, Product Management, Adobe

    We’ve entered the AI-first era, where experiences are no longer built only for people, but also to be understood and acted on by agents. In this new landscape, your owned property is not just a destination. It’s the source of truth for humans and machines, powering discovery, engagement, and continuous improvement across every channel. Success in this new era means being machine-optimized as much as human-optimized. Your content must be structured, trusted, and agent-readable. Your operations must evolve from manual workflows to intelligent systems that can create, govern, and optimize in real time. Join this session to discover the latest innovations in AEM to help you move faster, operate with trust, and ensure every experience is visible, consistent, and credible across both human and machine audiences.

    Monday, Apr 20
    Adobe on Adobe: Building an AI-Ready Foundation for Agentic Marketing [S853]

    , Sr. Director Marketing Data and Technology, Adobe

    , VP innovation, performance and COEs Enterprise Mkt, Adobe

    The agentic era of marketing demands more than AI experimentation — it requires a connected, enterprise-wide foundation. Hear from Adobe’s enterprise martech leaders, Max Cuellar, VP of Marketing, and Rama Krishna, senior director of Marketing Technology, on how our marketing organization is preparing to be AI-ready. Learn how we’re building a connected enterprise with Adobe Experience Platform to create a contextual foundation for agentic workflows that enables us to elevate customer experiences, accelerate our content supply chain, and activate business intelligence to power purpose-built Adobe AI agents. Go behind the scenes to see how Adobe is operationalizing AI to drive marketing velocity, scale personalization, and future-proof the organization. Walk away with practical strategies and architectural principles that you can apply to your own AI-driven marketing transformation.

    Key takeaways:

    • Gain a strategic view of how AI agents and agentic workflows will reshape enterprise marketing
    • Learn how Adobe’s marketing organization is building an AI-ready foundation with Adobe Experience Platform and Adobe AI
    • Discover best practices from Adobe’s journey to scale personalization and streamline workflows with AI
    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Not Product-Specific, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator
    • Monday, Apr 2011:30 AM - 12:30 PM PDT
      (Tuesday, Apr 2112:00 AM - 1:00 AM IST)

    Monday, Apr 20
    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Adobe on Adobe: The Future of B2B Marketing [S231]

    , Group Manager, DX Product Management, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, CXO Data & Technology COE, Adobe

    Buying behavior is increasingly digital, nonlinear, and largely invisible, creating a growing “dark funnel” that traditional tools and processes can no longer address. Learn how Adobe is paving the way for modern B2B marketing by applying its own Digital Experience solutions to unify customer data, orchestrate intelligent engagement, and scale content across the full buying cycle. We’ll share how Adobe connects real-time customer insight, agentic omnichannel orchestration, and a connected content supply chain to drive more relevant engagement, stronger sales alignment, and measurable revenue impact.

    Key takeaways:

    • How leading B2B organizations are unlocking the dark funnel and responding to nonlinear buying behavior
    • Why unified data and agentic orchestration are becoming foundational to modern revenue engines
    • How connecting data, journeys, and content enables faster execution, smarter engagement, and sustained growth
    Track: Workflow and Planning, Customer Data Management and Collaboration, From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents , Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Workfront, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition, Adobe Real-Time CDP B2B Edition, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics
    • Monday, Apr 2010:00 AM - 11:00 AM PDT

    <br><a href="https://business.adobe.com/summit/2026/sessions/adobe-realtime-cdp-the-musical-s502.html target=_blank">Watch</a><br>
    General audience
    Include in embedded catalog
    Monday, Apr 20
    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Adobe Real-Time CDP the Musical [S502]

    , Sr. Technical Marketing Engineer, Experience Cloud, Adobe

    , Sr. Technical Marketing Engineer, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe

    Summit has barely begun. Your coffee is still hot. Your expectations are still intact.
    Let’s fix that.

    This session opens Summit by making a series of bold, questionable decisions—chief among them: explaining Adobe RealTime CDP through a restrained but intentional musical. (Yes, an actual musical. No, we will not apologize.)

    Through songs, visuals, and a level of confidence that suggests we were not properly stopped, we’ll cover what business users actually need to know about RealTime CDP: what it is, how the core concepts fit together, and why marketing and IT benefit when they stop working at cross purposes and start sharing a single version of reality.

    Think of this as the opening number Summit didn’t know it needed. It’s high energy, slightly unhinged, and designed to make sure RealTime CDP does not fade into a blur of acronyms, diagrams, and well intentioned slides for the rest of the week.

    You’ll leave entertained, unexpectedly informed, and carrying a quiet but persistent thought:
    “That was… actually helpful. And do I really have a song about identity resolution stuck in my head?”

    Key takeaways

    • A clear understanding of why Adobe RealTime CDP matters, delivered before your brain has time to put up its usual conference defenses
    • A practical sense of how RealTime CDP capabilities work together, now permanently associated with melody and mild emotional confusion
    • A shockingly durable grasp of RealTime CDP fundamentals, thanks to repetition, rhyme, and the fact that your brain did not consent to remembering this much
       
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP
    • Monday, Apr 2010:00 AM - 11:00 AM PDT
      (10:30 PM - 11:30 PM IST)
      In-Person

    Adobe’s Approach to Safe, Effective Data Collaboration [S507]

    , Manager, Product Management, Adobe

    , Group Product Manager, RTCDP Collaboration, Adobe

    , Director of Global Advertising Platforms Technical Product Owner, The Coca-Cola Company

    , Client Investment Lead, WPP Media

    Now that first-party data has proven its value and you’ve refined it within your CDP, what’s next? With signal loss and increasing privacy concerns, brands need new strategies to engage audiences. In this session, discover how strategic data partnerships between publishers, brands, and agencies can unlock fresh opportunities for both brand building and performance marketing. We'll highlight how organizations are using Adobe’s privacy-centric data collaboration solution to drive real business results — regardless of industry or partner mix.

    Key Takeaways:

    • Steps leading brands have taken to achieve significant conversion lifts through collaboration

    • Strategic approaches to data partnerships across brands, publishers, and agencies for maximum impact

    • Practical guidance on adopting Real-Time CDP Collaboration to leverage first-party data

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP Collaboration, Adobe Real-Time CDP B2B Edition

    Advanced Content Automation with Workfront, Frame, Firefly, and PDF [L822]

    , Sr. Group Manager, Technical Program Management, Adobe

    , Workfront Enterprise Readiness Product Manager, Adobe

    This hands-on lab guides you through a modern content workflow, from creation to review and approval, using Adobe Workfront, Frame.io, Firefly, and PDF services. Learn how to leverage prebuilt Fusion chain scenarios to manage complexity, enable differentiated learning, and streamline content production. Familiarity with Adobe Workfront and Fusion is required in this advanced lab. If you’re a beginner, check out the lab “Take-off with Fusion! Go from 0 to Integration in 90 Minutes.”

    Key takeaways:

    • Understand and execute an end-to-end content workflow using Workfront, Frame.io, Firefly, and PDF services
    • Experience the value of chain scenarios in Fusion for managing complexity and enabling flexible learning
    • Learn to generate content briefs and marketing documents with generative AI and PDF automation
    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Document Cloud, Adobe Workfront, Adobe Frame.io, Adobe Firefly Services

    Wednesday, Apr 22

    AEM Developer Innovations: Agents, Edge, and More [S333]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Director, Product Management, Adobe

    Modern AEM development is evolving rapidly as AI agents, edge computing, and cloud-native tooling reshape how applications are built, deployed, and operated. Join for a deep dive into the latest developer innovations in Adobe Experience Manager as a Cloud Service.

    Follow the lifecycle of a real feature — from local development to production — while exploring topics including AI-powered IDE tools, local MCP debugging tools, pipeline troubleshooting, and modernization to Edge Delivery Services.

    Whether you build on the traditional AEM publish tier or Edge Delivery Services, discover how these innovations help developers accelerate delivery, reduce operational friction, and extend AEM beyond the web channel in the era of agentic experiences.

    Track: Developers , Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager

    AEM Forms: AI Innovations for Lead Generation, Automation, and Enrollment [S323]

    , Director, Product Management, Experience Manager Forms, Adobe

    , Sr Product Marketing Manager - AEM Forms, Adobe

    Forms are no longer static but dynamic experiences that power AI-driven brand discovery and help end users accomplish their goals, from booking service appointments to completing enrollments. Adobe Experience Manager Forms brings this vision to life by using AI-powered automation to understand author and end-user intent. It optimizes every interaction, whether human or agentic, to generate leads, automate business processes, and accelerate enrollment. Learn firsthand from Adobe product experts how our 2026 innovations enable agentic form creation and completion that drive efficiency and conversions.

    Key takeaways:

    • Intent-based form authoring that maintains brand consistency and regulatory compliance
    • Multimodal form experiences optimized for end users and AI agents
    • Optimized form performance for discoverability, engagement, and conversion across human and AI interactions
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Forms

    10:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    AEM Sites Optimizer: Evolving from Manual Workflows to the Agentic Web [S325]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Director Digital Marketing Platforms, Cox Communications

    In this AI-first era, agents are helping brands intelligently build, audit, and optimize engaging site experiences. Tasks that used to take days, multiple teams, and many Jira tickets, can now be acted on in minutes. To stay ahead in this world and optimize continuously, your operations must evolve from manual workflows to intelligent systems that can find, suggest, and deploy improvements at scale.

    Key Takeaways:

    • Hear how Cox Communications used Sites Optimizer to evolve from manual workflows to automatically implementing fixes that improved business results
    • Discover how teams can save time for more strategic projects, by letting agents handle the mundane tasks and deploy approved code and content suggestions directly into your CMS
    • Learn how you can try Sites Optimizer for free on your website
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer

    <br><a href="https://business.adobe.com/summit/2026/sessions/agentic-ai-and-the-future-of-marketing-in-financia-s740.html target=_blank">Watch</a><br>
    Include in embedded catalog
    Yoann Michaux
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    11:00 a.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Agentic AI and the Future of Marketing in Financial Services [S740]

    , Principal and EY Studio+ Leader, EY

    Financial services firms are racing to deploy AI across marketing, but technology alone won’t unlock transformation. The real shift is operational. As AI agents move from copilots to autonomous executors — optimizing media, generating compliant creative, orchestrating journeys, and continuously learning — marketing organizations must evolve beyond traditional campaign structures. Siloed teams, manual approvals, static journeys, and legacy measurement models can’t support an always-on, agent-driven growth engine. EY and Adobe explore what agentic marketing truly means for financial services leaders and what financial institutions must build now to stay competitive. For banks, insurers, and wealth managers facing margin pressure, regulatory scrutiny, and rising customer expectations, this isn’t incremental change — it’s a fork in the road.

    Key takeaways:

    • How AI agents transform media and creative into real-time optimization loops
    • Why governance, compliance, and human-in-the-loop design become competitive advantages
    • The new roles emerging in AI-first marketing organizations

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with EY Studio+ for marketing purposes.

      (Wednesday, Apr 2212:00 AM - 1:00 AM IST)

    • Start with trust and governance at every level so that your brand’s voice and quality scale responsibly through LLMs.
    • Deliver consumer-level experiences beyond channels, driven by a data feedback loop that continuously learns from performance and audience behavior so that every asset gets smarter and more effective over time.

    Agentic Web: Design, Automate, Convert with Webflow and Marketo [OS759]

    , Product Marketing Manager, Webflow

    , Head of Partner Integration, Experience Cloud, Adobe

    Your website should look good AND work hard. Today's marketing teams are under pressure to move faster, capture more leads, and prove pipeline impact, but most web and marketing automation stacks create friction instead of flow. See how Webflow’s Agentic Web Marketing Platform closes the gap between design and demand generation. We’ll walk through how the Marketo Engage for Webflow App empowers marketers to build brand-consistent forms visually — with real-time previews, enterprise-grade data integrity, and seamless marketing performance tracking — without relying on developers or compromising on compliance. Hear directly from Adobe and Webflow on what the partnership means in practice: faster time to pipeline, reliable attribution, and a website that becomes a predictable, measurable source of revenue.

    You will learn:

    • How modern marketing teams design forms
    • Automate lead capture
    • Drive pipeline faster using a connected web and marketing automation platform
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Marketo Engage

    Agent Orchestrator Unpacked: The Tech Powering Agentic Customer Experiences [S602]

    , Sr. Director of Product Management, Adobe

    , Sr. Manager, Product Management, Adobe

    Rapid technological innovation and sophisticated consumers create urgency for real-time, engaging interactions. Take a deep dive into Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, the engine powering agentic experiences that transform business goals into sophisticated, automated workflows. Adobe product leaders uncover the technology behind Agent Orchestrator and share how to tailor the solution to different business contexts while maintaining the quality, trust, and governance that businesses require. Explore customer use cases that integrate seamlessly with your existing technology stack so you can work with your current investments. 

    Key takeaways:

    • Discover the architecture behind Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, enabling smarter, agentic capabilities
    • Integrate agentic solutions into your workflows for greater efficiency and accelerated growth
    • Learn how to tailor AI technologies and innovations to your specific needs with proprietary data and tools grounded in your unique brand context

    Agents in Action: Transforming Marketing with Agent-First Workflows [S209]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Manager, Marketing Technology, Workday

    What does it take to succeed in an agentic world? 

    Explore how Adobe is transforming marketing by embedding intelligent agents into the marketing workflow, while examining Workday’s early insights on testing and preparing for agentic adoption. Discover practical strategies for aligning people, processes, and technology to unlock new levels of efficiency, creativity, and impact.

    Learn how agent-first approaches empower teams to automate routine tasks, personalize customer experiences, and drive measurable results. Examine real-world examples of agentic innovation, and gain insights into overcoming organizational challenges as you prepare for the future of marketing.

    Key takeaways:

    • Discover how agent-first workflows drive efficiency and innovation
    • Learn strategies for integrating agents across people, process, and technology
    • Gain actionable insights from Adobe's agentic transformation and Workday’s key learnings from their pilot journey

    , Sr. Staff Experience Designer, Adobe

    , Principal Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    AI is radically changing the future of work - and Adobe Workfront is leading the way. Join product leaders Paul Vaughn and Richard Whitehead for a forward-looking session on how Adobe is evolving strategic planning and workflow orchestration with an AI-first approach. Learn how Workfront is aligning product themes to mission-driven goals, customer needs, and market opportunities — all designed to simplify user experiences, automate work, and unlock new levels of productivity.

    , Sr. Director, Product - Workfront, Adobe

    , Sr. Staff Experience Designer, Adobe

    , Principal Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    AI is radically changing how work gets done — and Adobe Workfront is leading the way. Join Workfront product leaders for a forward-looking session on how Workfront is advancing to help teams automate end-to-end workflows, speed decision-making, and elevate enterprise marketing efficiency.
    This session will highlight the emerging capabilities shaping Workfront’s AI-powered future including how organizations can tap into human + agent collaboration to drive smarter, faster, more connected work.

    • Ensure compliance and brand consistency at scale across high-volume content
    • Remove manual busywork by automating repetitive tasks and enabling teams to focus on higher value work.
    • Get instant clarity by unlocking real time insights from work data through natural language

    AI B2B Real Talk: From Use Case to Realized Value [S204]

    , Director of B2B GTM Digital Transformation, Digital Strategy Group, Adobe

    , Founder & CEO, Onemedia Consulting

    Everyone in B2B is talking about AI, but few have battle scars from actually implementing it. Jessica and Wolfgang have been on the bleeding edge, advising enterprise organizations and building real AI use cases in Marketo Engage, from quick wins to custom integrations. Now they’re sharing what they’ve learned. 

    We’ll cut through the hype and get real about what it takes to make AI work in modern B2B marketing organizations. Get real examples and new frameworks for measuring impact, and learn what actually works — and what doesn’t. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • A method to prioritize AI opportunities by business impact 
    • Real-world examples and lessons learned between AI implementation and impact 
    • How to move your organization from AI chaos to strategy 
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Adobe Marketo Engage

    AI Content Productivity for Marketers: Brand Governance for On-Brand Campaigns [S416]

    , Sr. Director, Product Management (Adobe Express), Adobe

    , Sr. Director - Creative Technology & Operations, Eli Lilly and Company

    Marketing teams face an unprecedented demand for content that’s personalized, timely, and delivered across channels. AI-powered tools promise speed and scale to enable teams to produce more assets than ever before. But this opportunity comes with a challenge: How do you keep brand consistency as well as AI insights and compliance intact? Learn how Adobe is partnering with leading enterprises to harness innovative AI solutions across the content supply chain with Adobe Express, Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Workfront, and Adobe Experience Manager Assets to drive content productivity for your business.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how leading organizations are solving content challenges using secure AI solutions to extract actionable insights and creating standout on-brand content
    • Uncover winning strategies on how best to establish integrated workflows between marketing and creative teams to drive content productivity while controlling AI sprawl
    • Understand Adobe’s approach to helping brands boost efficiency across teams with its most powerful AI capabilities across its creative, document, and marketing ecosystems
    Track: Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Express, Adobe Acrobat Studio

    AI Form Innovations for Lead Generation, Automation, and Enrollment [OS338]

    , Director, Product Management, Experience Manager Forms, Adobe

    , Sr Product Marketing Manager - AEM Forms, Adobe

    Forms are no longer static but dynamic experiences that power AI-driven brand discovery and help end users accomplish their goals, from booking service appointments to completing enrollments. Adobe Experience Manager Forms brings this vision to life by using AI-powered automation to understand author and end-user intent. It optimizes every interaction, whether human or agentic, to generate leads, automate business processes, and accelerate enrollment. Learn firsthand from Adobe product experts how our 2026 innovations enable agentic form creation and completion that drive efficiency and conversions.

    Key takeaways:

    • Intent-based form authoring that maintains brand consistency and regulatory compliance
    • Multimodal form experiences optimized for end users and AI agents
    • Optimized form performance for discoverability, engagement, and conversion across human and AI interactions
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Forms

    AI in Marketing at Scale: How Global Brands Turn Pilots into Impact [S706]

    , Sr. Director, Marketing IT, CrowdStrike

    Learn how a global consumer brand brings AI into everyday marketing execution, moving from experiments to repeatable, enterprise-scale outcomes. Explore how technology leadership enables faster decisions, more relevant customer experiences, and higher content velocity across channels by connecting customer insights, content workflows, and activation into one cohesive approach. Discover practical ways teams apply generative AI responsibly to accelerate creation and iteration while protecting brand trust, legal requirements, and governance. Compare what works across industries through peer perspectives — where organizations succeed, where they stall, and which capabilities matter most to make AI useful for marketers, not just technologists.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to align data, content, workflow, and AI so that marketing teams scale personalization without creating bottlenecks
    • How global brands enable AI in marketing to move beyond pilots, scale personalization, and apply generative AI responsibly with real-world peer insights

    AI Innovation in Travel: Personalization and Storytelling [S918]

    , Chief Technology & Digital Innovation Officer, Brightline Trains

    , Global GM Industry Strategy - Travel, Hospitality, Dining & Loyalty, Adobe

    , VP Consumer Marketing, Princess Cruises

    By 2027, one in five search queries will shift to LLMs. As generative AI reshapes how travelers discover and choose brands, storytelling is emerging as the ultimate differentiator. Hear how two industry leaders — Brightline and Princess Cruises — are transforming experiences through data and AI. Brightline has re-engineered its data layer and relaunched critical use cases, positioning AI at the core of its 2026 strategy to drive innovation. Learn how Princess Cruises is leveraging loyalty as the foundation for personalization, using AI-driven insights to create connected experiences that deepen guest engagement. By integrating data across channels, they are redefining how loyalty programs deliver value and storytelling at scale. 

    Key takeaways:

    • Insights into the state of AI in travel and dining
    • Infusing AI into customer experience optimization and operational workflows, driving next-level personalization and efficiency
    • How to operationalize personalization, and practical steps to scale connected experiences

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    AI is rapidly changing how brands are discovered, experienced, and remembered, and customers are turning to AI systems for answers.     AI-Powered Decisioning for Web Experiences in Adobe Journey Optimizer [L610]

    , Sr. Technical Marketing Engineer, Adobe

    , Sr. Technical Marketing Engineer, Adobe

    Learn how to deliver contextual, AI‑driven decisioning to your website using Adobe Journey Optimizer. Configure decisions that react to real‑time contextual signals, build custom ranking formulas that blend AI model scores with profile and offer attributes, and integrate decision calls into a web experience to dynamically personalize content. See how external data sources enhance Adobe Journey Optimizer decisioning to create adaptive, responsive experiences. Define eligibility rules using contextual signals, and orchestrate content decisions within journeys to ensure that each offer is delivered at the right moment.

    Key takeaways:

    • Configure decisions that incorporate real-time contextual data to personalize web experiences dynamically
    • Build custom ranking formulas and apply AI ranking models that prioritize offers based on multiple signals, including visitor behavior
    • Use decisions in journeys with the Content Decision activity to deliver personalized offers to targeted audiences
    Track: Developers , Customer Engagement

    AI‑Powered Marketing with Adobe Experience Cloud for Regulated Industries [S739]

    , Vice President & COO Experience & Digital Marketing, New York Life

    , Vice President Technology - Experience & Digital Marketing, Client Growth & Retention, New York Life

    , Digital Customer Experience Leader, Capgemini

    Many industries such as financial services, healthcare, public sector, telecom, and more, face the same challenge: deliver personalized, compliant, and connected experiences at scale. This session demonstrates how Adobe Experience Cloud and AI can modernize marketing operations across any regulated, data‑complex business, using Life Insurance as a real‑world example.

    What attendees from any industry will learn:

    • How to scale compliant content operations with AI‑assisted creation and governance
    • How to use AI to predict customer behaviour and drive higher conversion and retention
    • How automation reduces inefficiency, shortens production cycles, and removes operational bottlenecks
    • How regulated industries leverage Adobe tools to stay compliant while still personalizing at scale
    • Transferable frameworks any marketer or CX leader can apply immediately

    Why attend?

    Whether you’re in P&C and Life Insurance, retail banking, healthcare, consumer services, or any data‑sensitive industry, you’ll gain practical insights into using AI + Adobe to elevate your marketing engine.

    AI-Powered Tools to Comprehend, Collaborate, and Create [OS422]

    , Principal Business Solutions Technologist, Adobe

    In this fast-paced 20-minute online session, discover how Acrobat Studio and Adobe Express work together to help you create, comprehend, and collaborate more effectively on documents and content. Learn how to move seamlessly from idea to impact by transforming static PDFs into engaging, actionable assets while keeping collaboration simple and efficient. Explore how Acrobat Studio streamlines document creation, editing, and review, and how Adobe Express enhances those workflows with quick visual storytelling, branding, and sharing capabilities. View examples of how teams can better understand content through intelligent PDF tools, communicate ideas clearly, and co-create with stakeholders in real time. Whether you’re preparing presentations, reports, or marketing materials, learn how to reduce friction, improve clarity, and empower everyone involved to contribute meaningfully.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how to create polished, engaging content using Acrobat Studio
    • Understand how to comprehend and review documents faster with smart PDF and collaboration tools
    • Discover simple ways to collaborate, share feedback, and co-create content across teams
    Track: Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents , Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams

    , Alliance Solution Lead, Merkle

    , Digital Marketing Technical Evangelist, Adobe

    Discover how pioneering brands are harnessing agentic AI to get results that accelerate CX. Industry leaders share their real-world journeys of implementing AI-driven strategies that don’t just react to customer needs — they anticipate, adapt, and act autonomously to deliver personalized experiences at scale. Hear firsthand how these experience makers are moving beyond traditional automation to deploy intelligent agents that make decisions, optimize journeys in real time, and drive measurable business outcomes. From reducing friction in complex customer workflows to scaling personalization across millions of touchpoints, these innovators reveal the tips, tricks, and strategies that are reshaping what’s possible in the age of AI.

    Key takeaways:

    • Hear from AI leaders across three companies with unique business problems
    • Learn how these industry leaders approached their use cases with innovative solutions leveraging agentic AI
    • Gain insight on how to navigate technical and organizational challenges to find success and drive measurable outcomes
    Track: Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Not Product-Specific, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator

    Monday, Apr 20
    AI to Activation: How Microsoft Is Reimagining Marketing at Scale [S916]

    , Director of B2B GTM Digital Transformation, Digital Strategy Group, Adobe

    , General Manager - Marketing Technology + AI, Microsoft

    , Program Manager, Microsoft

    Marketers know AI is essential, yet getting adoption across a spectrum of marketers—from product marketers to analysts to creatives—is one of the hardest transformation challenges. Join Microsoft as it reveals the playbooks and lessons learned from building an AI‑first marketing organization at scale.  Hear how strategic focus on enablement frameworks, learnings, and change management, driven by clear metrics, and AI + human collaboration processes contributed to success.

    Microsoft is redesigning its operating model and workflows around rapid experimentation and continuous improvement, weaving AI into high‑value moments like Firefly‑powered content creation and rapid activation across the Adobe ecosystem. While AI can generate content at scale, the real challenge is making that content useful, discoverable, and reusable. We will dive into Microsoft’s content supply chain transformation through intentional content centralization and a governed framework enabling scalable reuse.

    Key Takeaways:

    • A blueprint for transforming a complex marketing organization into an AI‑accelerated operating model
    • Guidance on enablement, change‑management, and continuous learning frameworks that scale AI adoption
    • Learnings from pilots, iterative tooling, and end‑to‑end content supply chain processes
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Target, Adobe Workfront, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP Collaboration, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Firefly, Adobe GenStudio, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition, Adobe Real-Time CDP B2B Edition, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics B2B Edition, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    As any athlete knows, being the best takes hours of practice, hard work and dedication. The same is true in the world of analytics - it takes time and dedication to understand your data to turn it into actionable insights.  


    In this session, we will review the latest Adobe Analytics innovations and tips, as well as a peak at our product roadmap that will help you and your organization compete to be the best in 2026 and beyond. 
    Learn about:

    • The latest features that will make it easier to simplify your analysis
    • New ways to analyze your data and augment your analysis toolkit
    • The upcoming Adobe Analytics roadmap to make a gameplan for success
    • A sneak peek at AI innovations that will unlock new analysis capabilities

    A Path to AI-Native Modernization: Future of Experience in the Agentic Era [S328]

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    Tomorrow’s experiences will be built by both humans and intelligent agents. This session explores how brands are using AEM Cloud Service and agentic architecture to future-proof their digital foundations, automating migration, accelerating content creation, and optimizing for AI-driven engagement. Featuring insights from customers, you’ll learn how a modernized AEM environment enables teams to build faster, adapt quicker, and ensure every page, image, and component is ready for AI discovery and brand-safe reuse.

    Key Takeaways:

    • How to accelerate site modernization with minimal rework
    • How agentic architecture enables continuous content improvement
    • How to prepare your content for AI-powered discovery and reuse

    Athletes as a Brand: Bigger Than The Jersey – How Athletes are Getting Creative to Build Their Personal Brand [S152]

    The world’s best athletes are building a brand that no longer starts and ends on the field. Instead, they’re tapping into creativity, using storytelling, culture, and self-expression to build personal brands that expand platforms, grow audiences, and create moments that fuel direct fan relationships that outlast beyond their careers. 

    This panel, developed in collaboration with Sport Beach, brings together perspectives to explore how personal branding is reshaping the sports landscape. Discover how athletes are building lasting brands and how teams, leagues, and partners are leaning in to encourage it. When athletes build a brand with a consistent presence, they create loyal communities that open new paths for fan engagement.

    Key takeaways:

    • Explore how teams and leagues are turning athlete’s personal brands into audience acquisition
    • Discover how athletes are leveraging storytelling, culture, and creativity to build long-lasting fan bases
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, Customer Engagement, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Not Product-Specific

    Audience Agent at Work: A Practitioner’s Guide to Smarter Workflows [S506]

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    In today’s experience-driven economy, understanding your audience is the foundation of creating meaningful, personalized engagement. The ability to acquire, organize, and activate high-quality audience data quickly and responsibly is critical to delivering relevant experiences across every touchpoint. Learn how Adobe Real-Time Customer Data Platform (CDP) enables an AI-powered and audience-driven approach to customer engagement by unifying data, activating insights in real time, and embedding agents directly into marketers’ workflows. See how new innovations, including Audience Agent powered by Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, help teams accelerate audience creation, reduce manual effort, and surface insights that drive more timely and relevant interactions — all while maintaining strong governance and privacy controls. For a deeper dive, attend the following hands-on lab, L515.

    Key takeaways:

    • How Adobe Real‑Time CDP brings AI directly into marketers’ workflows, enabling smarter segmentation
    • How AI-powered tools can reduce manual work, help teams build high-value audiences faster, and surface actionable insights that marketers can use right away.
    • Steps to embed AI into audience workflows so that your teams can deliver timely, personalized experiences across the full customer journey
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP

    Author and Deliver Headless Content with AEM and the Universal Editor [TRN01]

    , Sr. Technical Instructor, Adobe

    Please bring your own device to participate in the hands-on demonstrations during this session.

     

    Unlock the power of Adobe Experience Manager’s headless CMS in this hands-on, one-day preconference training. Learn how to model and manage Content Fragments, organize them with folder policies, and surface them through GraphQL APIs and persisted queries. You’ll also gain practical experience editing published headless content directly on remote sites with the Universal Editor’s in-context authoring. Designed for content authors who want to create scalable, reusable content, this course equips you with the skills to deliver high-performance, API-driven experiences across any channel.

    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Sites
    Purchase Required: $850 in addition to the required in-person full conference pass Visit Attendee Dashboard.

    Author and Manage Pages with Universal Editor for Edge Delivery Services [TRN02]

    , Principal Environment Experience Architect, Adobe

    Please bring your own device to participate in the hands-on demonstrations during this session.

     

    Accelerate your web authoring with Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Universal Editor, and Edge Delivery Services in this immersive one-day preconference training. Learn to visually create and manage pages using the Universal Editor’s intuitive interface, while leveraging block components, reusable content, and generative AI capabilities to speed content creation. Gain hands-on experience publishing to Edge Delivery Services for lightning-fast, scalable site performance, and explore best practices around templates, workflows, metadata, and page management. Whether you’re a content author or digital team lead, this course will show you how to deliver modern, high-performance web experiences with confidence.

    Monday, Apr 20
    Automate AI Image Variations with Adobe Workfront Fusion and Firefly Boards [L612]

    , Sr. Principal Solutions Consultant, Adobe

    , Firefly Solutions Consultant, Adobe

    Scaling AI-assisted imagery while maintaining asset governance is a critical challenge for content teams. Discover how to programmatically enrich approved assets using Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Workfront Fusion, and Firefly Boards. Build Workfront Fusion scenarios that automate asset flows from Experience Manager Assets into Firefly Boards using custom presets and metadata-driven logic. Start with a single product asset, like a scarf or watch, and construct scenarios that dynamically place products onto different models and environments aligned to specific audiences, regions, or channels. Learn how Firefly Boards enables controlled generative enrichment while Workfront Fusion provides automation and repeatability.

    Key takeaways:

    • Build Fusion scenarios orchestrating asset enrichment across Experience Manager Assets and Firefly Boards
    • Apply custom presets and metadata rules to generate audience-specific variations at scale
    • Implement governance-friendly AI workflows preserving asset approval and system integrity
    Track: Developers , Workflow and Planning, Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Creative Cloud, Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Custom Models

    Wednesday, Apr 22
    10:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Automate Customer Retention and Loyalty with Real-Time Data Triggers [S732]

    , Manager - AI and Personalization, TELUS

    Learn how TELUS is transforming the customer experience by replacing legacy batch processing with a real-time, agentic AI ecosystem projected to drive up to $23.4M in revenue through 2028. Nearly 80% of voluntary churn is “silent,” leaving businesses with no time to react. To meet 2026 growth targets, TELUS built a cutting-edge segmentation and offer engine using Adobe Journey Optimizer, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, and Google Cloud to slash response latency from 48 hours to mere minutes. Explore the architecture behind this transformation, and get a deep dive into the next generation of agentic capabilities that automate the reasoning, action and learning loops.

    Key takeaways:

    • Overcoming the technical constraints of overnight batch processing to enable 1-1 MMS and push notifications in near real-time
    • A look at the Reasoning, Action, Monitoring, and Learning agents that analyze customer history to deliver hyper-personalized offers
    • Strategies for scaling real-time triggers across diverse household brands and net-new use cases

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with TELUS for marketing purposes.

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Analytics, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    AZEK’s Adobe-Powered Evolution to Build the Future of Digital Experience [OS753]

    , VP, Digital, James Hardie / The Azek Company

    , VP, Global Technology, SH/FT

    Most enterprises face disconnected tools, manual processes, and siloed teams that can’t deliver the personalized experiences that customers expect. Hear how AZEK and SH/FT orchestrated customer experiences using Adobe Experience Cloud. Brian Sekerak from AZEK and Courtney Martin and Evan Lavidor from SH/FT share how they unified fragmented data sources into a single customer view to drive next-best-action across channels. Explore the architectural decisions that turned content bottlenecks into velocity engines, enabling teams to launch more campaigns without proportionally increasing headcount or budgets.

    Key takeaways:

    • Real-world personalization strategies that scale relevant experiences across the complex matrix of manufacturing audiences each with different needs and buying journeys
    • Why moving from batch campaigns to real-time orchestration fundamentally changes how marketing, sales, and digital teams collaborate
    • Blueprint for transforming legacy marketing operations into competitive advantage

    Struggling to keep pace with increasingly complex B2B customer journeys? Join this high-level session for a guided overview of how AI is transforming customer journey management across our B2B portfolio, from adaptive engagement to intelligent decisioning. Get a cohesive view of how adaptive journeys, omnichannel orchestration, AI-powered sales qualification, and Intelligent insights and actions work together to deliver more connected, responsive, and outcome-driven B2B experiences.
