    Tuesday, Apr 21
    3:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    MLB’s Path to “Sunny and 75”: Scaling Weather Based Fan Journeys [S925]

    , Enterprise Architect, Adobe

    , Sr. Director, Product, Major League Baseball

    Hear how Major League Baseball (MLB) built a practical roadmap to deliver faster, more personalized fan experiences while accelerating time to value. In partnership with Adobe, MLB shifted from long, linear delivery cycles to an agile, test-and-learn approach that enables teams to launch, measure, and optimize customer journeys in weeks, not months.
     
    This session explores how MLB is using Adobe Journey Optimizer at scale to power real-time engagement across the full fan lifecycle—from pre-game planning and in-venue experiences to post-game next best actions. Attendees will get a closer look at MLB’s “Sunny and 75” use case, which brings together data, orchestration, and personalization to create the ideal fan experience when it matters most.
     
    You’ll also learn how MLB measures journey performance end-to end-using Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, turning insights into action and continuously improving results. Walk away with practical guidance on building scalable use cases, driving measurable impact, and creating a repeatable model for personalization that grows with your business.
     
    Key Takeaways:
    •    How MLB accelerates journey time to value and adapts to ever changing weather
    •    What it takes to deploy Adobe Journey Optimizer at scale across complex organizations
    •    How to measure and optimize fan journeys using actionable, real-time insights

    Track: Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Modern Commerce Without Risk: Hands-On with Adobe Commerce Cloud Service [L320]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Manager, Software Development, Adobe

    Modern commerce success isn’t about migrating for the sake of change — it’s about delivering faster, operating with less risk, and enabling teams to build and scale with confidence. Join Adobe product and architecture leaders to explore why Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service is designed for modern commerce teams and how you can start realizing value immediately. Learn how to build a cloud-native storefront, and discover how Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service can empower your teams.

    Key takeaways:

    • Build and modernize storefronts using edge-rendered components and an API-first architecture with Adobe Commerce Optimizer
    • Extend and customize commerce capabilities using App Builder without modifying core platform code
    • Achieve elastic scale, accelerated deployments, and zero-downtime updates with cloud-native infrastructure and observability

    Monday, Apr 20
    Moving Enterprises From AI Experimentation to Customer Experience Impact [SK1]

    , VP, Experience Cloud Portfolio, Adobe

    , Chief Marketing Officer, Ulta Beauty

    , Chief Technology and Transformation Officer, Ulta Beauty

    , Engineering Program Manager, Customer Experience Orchestration, Adobe

    , Senior AI Product Manager, Adobe

    , Senior Director, CXO Product Portfolio, Adobe

    Enterprises are moving past AI experimentation and focusing on what really matters — results.

    In this Strategy keynote, you’ll hear from leading organizations that are using generative and agentic AI to move faster, reduce operational drag, and deliver better customer experiences. We’ll share concrete examples of how teams are driving measurable value in everyday work, automating image generation, customer journeys, complex workflows, and much more.

    Sunil Menon, VP of Experience Cloud Portfolio will outline Adobe’s point of view on how this shift is reshaping marketing and customer experience, and why now is the moment to act. You’ll see live demonstrations from Adobe product and engineering leaders that bring the strategy to life and show how enterprises are turning AI investment into measurable impact.

    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents

    Piyush Patel
    4:00 p.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Moving from Navigational Pages to an On-Demand Experience [S723]

    , Chief Ecosystem Officer, Algolia

    The digital world is shifting from navigational pages to the intentional web, where the brand does the work for the customer. As AI agents become the primary interface, the success of those agents depends on a trusted knowledge core. If Adobe Experience Platform knows the user, and Adobe Experience Manager has the content, Algolia is the connective tissue serving as the intelligent retrieval layer in the middle with grounded data and content enabling on-demand experiences. Learn how real-time retrieval bridges the gap between who the user is and what the brand knows. Discover how to deliver personalized experiences that anticipate intent and deliver brand-safe outcomes sourced from your brand and partner ecosystems, at sub-millisecond speed.

    Key takeaways:

    • Syncing Experience Platform, Experience Manager, and Algolia to shift the work from the customer to the brand
    • Using Experience Platform behavioral history to retrieve content catered specifically to the individual
    • Grounding your agents to ensure that experiences are brand-safe and hallucination-free

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Algolia for marketing purposes.

    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Commerce, Adobe GenStudio, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe GenStudio for Connected TV , Adobe GenStudio Content Marketing , Adobe GenStudio for Creative Production

    , CMO, Semrush

    In the AI search era, customers who come from agentic search convert 4.4x more than from other channels. In this panel discussion, learn how customers invested their resources and prioritized brand visibility across traditional search as well as agentic/AI search. Hear firsthand how they navigated the complex and fast-changing world of traditional and agentic search.

    •    The key approaches to building visibility across search and AI-driven discovery
    •    How to prioritize and align resources in a rapidly changing search environment

    Keir Bradshaw
    11:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Navigating the New, AI-First Operating Model for Marketing [OS752]

    , Director, Marketing Technology, Baptist Health South Florida

    The mandate to implement AI often feels like the wild west — lots of single-serve apps, unstructured data, no compass. While the pressure to leverage AI’s benefits is high, marketing operations leaders are uniquely positioned to lead this transformation. After all, the marketing ops role already touches every pillar of organizational maturity, from data and technology to the people and processes that power them. Keir Bradshaw from MERGE offers a comprehensive framework to assess your organization’s AI readiness. MERGE’s philosophy is to use AI as your co-architect — a force multiplier for your team, not a replacement for human critical thinking. Drawing on real-world insights and use cases from brands on the Adobe Experience Cloud, get to know MERGE’s proprietary AI assessment scorecard to navigate emotional readiness.

    Key takeaways:

    • Why and how to assess the human factor and temperament of your team to ensure cultural alignment
    • Identify workflows where AI can deliver the most significant value for your team and your customers
    • How to approach ethical usage rules and processes for standardized metadata
    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Content Supply Chain for the AI World, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Not Product-Specific, Adobe Workfront

    Navigating Your Journey from Adobe Analytics to Customer Journey Analytics [L122]

    , Senior Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Transitioning from Adobe Analytics to Adobe Customer Journey Analytics requires careful planning and several strategic decisions. Get the tools and guidance you need to make informed choices and confidently select the best evolution strategy for your organization. You’ll complete hands-on exercises to implement the Adobe Experience Platform Web SDK and start sending data to Customer Journey Analytics. Learn how to compare and validate Analytics and Customer Journey data, and how to automatically migrate reports and dashboards into Customer Journey Analytics.

    Key takeaways:

    • Understand the tradeoffs and advantages of different pathways to Customer Journey Analytics
    • Modernize data collection with the Experience Platform Web SDK while minimizing effort and rework
    • Learn how to migrate data and reporting components from Adobe Analytics into Adobe Experience Platform and Customer Journey Analytics
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    General audience
    Include in embedded catalog
    Baylee Simon
    1:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Not a Panel: A B2B Working Session for Content Demand Reality [S745]

    Complex buying journeys, multiple personas at each stage, new channels; these drive an increased demand for personalization, yet frequently the number of resources to do the work remains the same. In theory, technology exists to create a content supply chain for the future and meet that demand. In reality, the way ahead is rarely one-size-fits-all.

     

    So if it's not one-size-fits-all, how do you find what's right for you? Panelists join Deloitte Digital to talk about how they're solving this across B2B marketing and sales, where they've seen challenges, and prognosticate what's next. Expect debate on topics like centralized vs federated AI organizational models, how to get sales teaming successfully with marketing, how to stay creatively ambitious in a regulated industry, and more.

     

    Highlights:

    • See how different leading brands solve the same content problem in different ways within their business
    • Approaches to governance, approvals, and reuse for your risk tolerance
    • Tactics to improve findability and field adoption based on how your teams actually work

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Deloitte Digital for marketing purposes.

    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, B2B Customer Journeys, Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web

    Nothing Beats a Jet2 Holiday: Turning Travel Data into Delight [S924]

    , Director TMT, Travel and Services UKI, Adobe

    , SVP and Transformation Office Director, Jet2

    Jet2.com is reshaping the digital travel experience with a modern, flexible foundation built on Adobe Experience Manager and Edge Delivery Services. By moving to a faster, more accessible platform and migrating major destination sites seamlessly, the team created a scalable framework that supports both operational efficiency and rapid content delivery. Building on this foundation, Jet2.com transformed the customer journey itself — leveraging Adobe Experience Platform and Adobe Target to activate real-time insights, refine audience strategies, and deliver relevant experiences across web, email, and app. The result: smarter personalization, improved efficiency, and journeys that better meet travelers’ needs. Gain practical insights on building a hybrid CMS model, aligning teams around shared insights, and delivering adaptable, customer-centered experiences at scale.

    Key takeaways:

    • See how Jet2.com boosted accessibility with a seamless platform migration
    • Learn how real-time personalization and smarter audience strategies drove savings
    • Explore how Jet2.com’s hybrid CMS model enables a scalable, customer-focused travel experience
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Optimize Brand Visibility for AI Agents and Generative Search [L336]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Director of Engineering, Adobe

    Adobe LLM Optimizer helps you understand brand visibility in AI search, identify opportunities to improve content for LLMs, and simulate the impact of optimizations. Explore how agentic traffic, content visibility, and referral traffic come together to shape a brand’s presence in generative answers.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how to diagnose visibility issues by exploring citation attempts, agentic traffic, URL visibility, and prompt-level performance

    9:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Orchestrate B2B Journeys with Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition [L223]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Practice Lead, Adobe

    Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition gives marketers powerful tools to design and deliver buying group journeys, but getting the most out of the platform requires thoughtful setup, clean data, and a clear orchestration strategy. This hands-on lab guides you through the essential building blocks of high-performing B2B programs, from structuring unified account and buying group profiles to designing audience rules that scale. Explore how to build journeys that adapt to complex B2B decision paths, use activation insights to refine targeting, and troubleshoot issues that impact accuracy or performance. Working in your own or a demo environment, practice validating conditions, applying governance patterns, and iterating with confidence.

    Key takeaways:

    • Structure unified account and buying group profiles for scalable orchestration
    • Build and validate adaptive B2B journeys using activation insights
    • Evaluate journey health and troubleshoot performance issues

    Orchestrating Multistep Campaigns in Adobe Journey Optimizer [L537]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Solution Architect DX Customer Engineering, Adobe

    Learn how to create a multistep orchestrated campaign in Journey Optimizer based on real customer use cases. Get practical techniques to streamline campaign execution and deliver personalized experiences that drive results — from building advanced multi-entity audience segments to applying business logic and activating for outbound channels.

    Key takeaways:

    • Build smarter, more actionable audiences by leveraging multi entity data, precise targeting conditions, and flexible segmentation tools
    • Orchestrate journeys with agility using workflow activities like Fork, Change Dimension, Split, and Deduplication to shape dynamic, data driven customer flows
    • Deliver measurable impact by saving reusable audiences and activating personalized messages that scale across campaigns and future initiatives
    Track: Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Orchestrating the Agentic Enterprise: Industry-First AI Workflows [CP8]

    , Principal Solution Consultant, Cognizant Moment

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    While individual AI agents offer efficiency, the true enterprise breakthrough happens when industry-specific intelligence meets seamless orchestration. See how Cognizant’s AI platform integrates with Adobe’s Agent Orchestrator to solve complex, high-stakes industry use cases. Experience a live prototype of “connected intelligence” that manages the entire customer lifecycle — from regulatory-compliant content in FSI to hyper-localized retail experiences. Leave with a roadmap for transitioning from isolated bots to orchestrated ecosystems.

    Key takeaways:

    • Discover how Cognizant’s AI platform extends Adobe’s agentic capabilities for the enterprise
    • View a live prototype of multi-platform orchestration solving real-world industry hurdles
    • Learn a framework for governing AI agents across disparate brand and data silos

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Cognizant for marketing purposes.

    Monday, Apr 20
    PepsiCo & Adobe: Rebuilding Creative Foundations for the AI Era [S419]

    , Principal Technical Product Manager, Creative Technology, PepsiCo

    , Sr. Director, Enterprise Portfolio & Solutions Enablement, Adobe

    The creative landscape has evolved dramatically in service of the ever-growing consumer demand for personalized content. Creative teams struggle to keep pace without sacrificing quality, and outdated tools and processes have reached a breaking point. Join PepsiCo and Adobe to learn more about rebuilding the foundations of creative workflows for the AI era: eliminating the overhead of managing creative work, keeping creative teams focused on craft to differentiate their brand, and accelerating the production of high-quality content at scale to meet marketing demands.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to infuse AI across the creative process for speed and scale without losing craft and quality
    • Eliminating the overhead of managing creative work by unifying creative work-in-progress
    • A blueprint for rebuilding your own creative foundations within the content supply chain
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World, Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Creative Cloud, Adobe Firefly, Adobe Frame.io, Adobe Firefly Services

    Monday, Apr 20
    Personalization in Healthcare & Life Sciences: AI in Action [S914]

    , Head of Global Industry Strategy, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Adobe

    , Senior Director, Content Personalization Platform Capabilities, Eli Lilly

    , Enterprise Executive Director, Digital Marketing, Cleveland Clinic

    , Sr Director, Digital and Marketing Operations, Edwards Lifesciences

    , CMO, Blue Shield of California

    Personalization is no longer optional in healthcare and life sciences – it's an expectation. Patients, members, and customers demand experiences tailored to their unique needs, whether navigating care, managing benefits, or engaging with therapies and devices. Explore how payor and provider organizations, as well as pharma and medtech leaders, can leverage Adobe’s AI-driven solutions to deliver personalized engagement at scale. Discuss industry trends, practical use cases, and strategies for integrating AI into existing workflows to improve outcomes, enhance satisfaction, and drive loyalty.

    Key takeaways:

    • Gain actionable insights on how personalization can transform the healthcare and life sciences experience while meeting compliance and security requirements
    • Learn how to move from aspiration to execution with tools available today
    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Not Product-Specific

    Personalization Under Pressure: Lessons from High-Stakes Journeys [S720]

    , System Director, Consumer Engagement and Digital Enablement, CommonSpirit Health

    , Global Brand Management Director, Oral Care, Sunstar Suisse SA

    , Senior Account Director, Qualified Digital

    In moments where trust, timing, and data responsibility are non-negotiable, personalization has to work differently. Brand leaders share how they designed and scaled consumer journeys in one of the most demanding experience environments imaginable. Rather than focusing on tools alone, this discussion unpacks the decisions, trade-offs, and governance models behind unifying data and orchestrating journeys with Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Journey Optimizer, and Marketo. Drawing from real-world experience in high-stakes industries, walk away with practical principles for delivering trusted, scalable personalization.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to scale personalization without sacrificing trust or privacy
    • What it takes to orchestrate end-to-end journeys across channels and data
    • Which personalization bets actually drive impact — and most importantly, which don’t

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Qualified Digital for marketing purposes.

    10:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Powering Customized AI Models to Deliver Enterprise Content at Scale [S453]

    , Filed CTO, M&E, Firefly Foundry, Adobe

    , Group Manager, Product Strategy & Marketing, Firefly Enterprise, Adobe

    As demand for personalized, high-quality content accelerates, enterprise teams face a widening gap due to expectations rising but not budgets and resources. Generative AI promises faster creation, yet general-purpose models often miss the mark when it comes to brand fidelity, governance, and enterprise-grade precision. This session showcases how brands are partnering with Adobe to create custom, brand-trained generative AI models to power standout experiences while safeguarding IP. Discover how model customization and fine-tuned training with Firefly Custom Models and Firefly Foundry unlocks transformative business value, accelerating time to market, reducing production costs, and enabling new creative possibilities — all while adhering to responsible AI principles and enterprise-grade security.

    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Firefly, Adobe Firefly Foundry, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Creative Production, Adobe Firefly Custom Models, Adobe Firefly Design Intelligence

    Saad Farooq
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    10:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Powering the Play: How Dick’s Sporting Goods Wins with Athlete-Centric Innovation [S731]

    , VP of Engineering, Dick's Sporting Goods

    , MarTech Leader - North America, Globant

    In the world of retail, many brands focus on the transaction; Dick’s Sporting Goods focuses on the Athlete. By shifting the paradigm from selling products to fueling performance, Dick’s Sporting Goods—in partnership with Globant—has redefined what it means to put the customer at the center of the digital ecosystem.

    Join leaders from Globant and Dick’s Sporting Goods for a deep dive into the strategy and technology behind a truly athlete-centric experience. We will explore how a unified data strategy and Adobe Experience Cloud empower the brand to meet athletes where they are—from the court to the trailhead.

    Key takeaways:

    • The Athlete-First Mindset: How to pivot organizational culture from product-centric to persona-centric.
    • The Tech Stack in Action: A look at how DSG integrated tools to create seamless, personalized journeys across web, app, and in-store.
    • Winning Results: Real-world insights into how prioritizing the athlete’s journey drives long-term loyalty and measurable ROI.

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Globant for marketing purposes.

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Customer Engagement, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Target, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Wednesday, Apr 22
    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Powering Unified Experiences at Scale — The Adobe Customer Zero Blueprint [S653]

    , Director Solution Engineering, Adobe

    , Sr. Director, Engineering, Adobe

    At Adobe’s scale, exceptional customer experiences require data, content, journeys, insights, and experimentation working in concert. This vision is possible by unifying powerful applications. Adobe Experience Platform provides a robust data foundation, and Real-Time CDP enables high-volume audience delivery across social, advertising, streaming, and edge destinations. Adobe Journey Optimizer supports hundreds of live journeys and campaigns across inbound and outbound channels enriched by a native Adobe Experience Manager Assets integration and guided by 2,500+ live experiments. Customer Journey Analytics brings together datasets for cross-channel measurement and optimized journey performance. From onboarding to upsell, retention, and churn mitigation, our internal implementation shows how integrated applications enable customer-centric engagement and omnichannel activation.

    Key takeaways:

    • Hear from Adobe experts on the architecture, practices, and operational frameworks powering our unified experience at scale
    • Best practices for standardizing implementation patterns, setting guardrails, and managing thousands of users, teams, and concurrent campaigns
    • How we build resilient, high-performance systems to support high-volume, high-impact events like Adobe MAX
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Analytics, Customer Engagement, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP Collaboration, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Content Analytics, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer, Adobe Journey Optimizer Experimentation Accelerator, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    , Associate Director of Personalization, Bounteous

    , SVP of Marketing, Bounteous

    , Director Marketing Technology, CVS Health

    , Director, Digital Experience, CVS Health

    Every day, CVS Health strives to be America’s most trusted healthcare company and to make healthcare simpler — one person, one family, and one community at a time. CVS is expected to deliver personalized, AI-driven customer and patient experiences at an immense scale, all while maintaining the highest standard of data privacy and HIPAA compliance. CVS and Bounteous share how a highly regulated, enterprise-scale organization can unlock business value and drive meaningful customer and patient experiences by harnessing the full Adobe technology ecosystem and its embedded AI capabilities.

    Key takeaways:

    • How Adobe Target AI features can yield more precise results faster and more efficiently
    • How CVS leveraged Adobe Journey Optimizer to bring personalized Rx experiences to market
    • How Adobe Workfront became the consistent thread across programs, bringing efficiencies and speed to market

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    11:00 a.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Proactive Run & Operate: How Teams Prevent Failures in Experience Platform [S652]

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Digital Marketing Developer, Wegmans

    Drive operational efficiency, streamline workflows, and scale with confidence without compromising performance or stability. Learn how to achieve optimal Adobe Experience Platform performance using out‑of‑the‑box Run and Operate tooling to keep your platform and applications running smoothly and delivering consistent business outcomes. Move beyond reactive alerts by combining macro‑context visibility, self‑serve diagnostics, and capability‑level monitoring. With real customer examples, explore forces reshaping how teams operate at scale: understanding end‑to‑end behavior, enabling low‑touch self‑service operations, and monitoring platforms for business results. 

    Key takeaways:

    • Leverage metrics and observability insights to understand batch and streaming performance, operational utility across capabilities, and mature your operational readiness through capacity management
    • Empower teams to troubleshoot job schedules, debug health checks, and manage special event lifecycles with confidence and minimal intervention
    • Reimagine monitoring for contextual behavior understanding, proactive alerts, and business capability oversight
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Analytics, Customer Engagement, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP Collaboration, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Mix Modeler, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer, Adobe Journey Optimizer Experimentation Accelerator, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Enterprise Workfront Platform Lead & Product Owner, TD Bank U.S.

    Managing compliance procedures at scale in a complex, regulated environment requires balancing speed, accuracy and governance. As work grows in volume in complexity, manual processes can slow operations and create oversight challenges. In this session, discover how Nuria Munguia helps teams streamline procedure change management and monthly operations using Adobe Workfront. Learn how standardized workflows, yearly attestations, and integrated reporting helped teams save thousands of hours while supporting compliance across hundreds of business lines.

    • Eliminate repetitive operational tasks with intelligent routing and recurring workflows
    • Gain real-time visibility into resources and outcomes for better decision-making and continuous improvement

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    3:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Sales Qualifier: AI Boosts Marketing Lead Conversion and Much More [S207]

    , Director - Product Management, Adobe

    , Product Marketing, B2B AI and Apps, Adobe

    , VP Operations, GNW Consulting

    BDRs and SDRs play a crucial role at the intersection of B2B marketing and sales. Through inbound qualification and outbound prospecting, these teams can make all the difference in sales productivity, return on upstream marketing investment, and earning trust. Unfortunately, many fall short. We will discuss the universal challenges that these teams face and how Adobe can help. Learn about Adobe’s new AI-first solution for business and sales development – Sales Qualifier — which delivers newfound efficiency and scale, high-quality engagement, and bridges the gap between marketing and sales.     

    Key takeaways: 

    • See how Sales Qualifier helps with every step, from prioritization and research to personalized engagement, prospect meetings, and automation of administrative tasks 
    • Discover how Sales Qualifier lets leaders and reps select and adapt the right balance of AI assistance and fully autonomous AI workflows to deliver on their goals
    • Understand practical next steps for supercharging your business and sales development teams 
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition

    , Product Management, Adobe

    , Principal Business Consultant, Adobe

    For the benefit of Marketing, Sales, Ops, and spam-weary B2B prospects everywhere, Adobe is reimagining the business and sales development function with agentic AI. In this lab, you’ll get a “hands on keyboard” front row seat to this innovation. Together, we’ll explore Adobe’s Sales Qualifier and how it can, through assistive and autonomous AI, better enable the "final mile” of prospect engagement and qualification for Sales.

    Scale Content with GenAI Workflows in GenStudio for Performance Marketing [L412]

    , Product Strategy & Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Director of Engineering, GenStudio, Adobe

    Get hands-on with Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing and explore how self-serve workflows help teams keep pace with growing content demand and combat accelerating content decay. Work through real-world use cases leveraging new integrations and product capabilities. From building paid media ad templates to quickly assembling, activating, and optimizing on-brand marketing content, gain a practical understanding of how Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing enables teams to self-serve ad assembly, move faster, and deliver high-quality content at scale without compromising brand integrity.

    Key takeaways:

    • Assemble, activate, and optimize marketing ads through a fully self-serve, end-to-end workflow
    • Understand how GenStudio for Performance Marketing helps teams meet rising content demand while maintaining quality, consistency, and brand integrity

    Scaled Content Production: Build Custom Creative Workflows [L450]

    , Senior AI Engagement Manager, Firefly Enterprise, Adobe

    , Group Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    See what scaled content production looks like in practice using new workflow-building tools in Adobe, built specifically for enterprise teams. An AI agent helps you translate goals into a draft version of a production pipeline. You can then refine the steps to generate production-grade outputs at massive scale across paid media and social variants, e-commerce product refreshes, and asset localization. Get examples that span 2D design + imagery, 3D digital twins, and short-form video variants using templates, structured inputs, and reusable orchestration steps. See how these pipelines connect with Adobe’s broader content supply chain solutions. Leave with reusable recipes and a clear starting point for piloting scaled production workflows in real campaigns.

    Key takeaways:

    • Understand Adobe’s scaled content automation model and where workflows drive speed + consistency
    • Build three repeatable production workflows using templates, data inputs, and AI-assisted orchestration
    • Take home reusable workflow patterns to kick-start an internal pilot
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Frame.io, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Creative Production

    , Sr. Lifecycle Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, GenStudio, Adobe

    Scaling Multichannel B2B Orchestration at AWS with Adobe  [S210]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Technical Product Manager, Amazon

    , Sr. Product Manager - Tech, AWS

    AWS marketing has transformed its once-fragmented ecosystem into an integrated, marketer-friendly environment built for scale, speed, and personalization. Hear how AWS evolved from standalone tools and disconnected channels to a unified orchestration engine, powered by Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition, streamlining its digital marketing activities across owned and paid media channels. Learn how AWS is approaching real-time capabilities, including web personalization at scale and AI-driven decisioning, to boost engagement and responsiveness and deliver connected experiences across every channel.  

    Key takeaways:  

    • Cut time to market from months to weeks with integrated journey orchestration and rapid end-to-end testing that speeds decision-making and experimentation
    • Empower marketing teams with streamlined workflows through an intuitive UI to build and personalize journeys without heavy technical dependencies
    • Deliver unified, personalized customer experiences by connecting segmentation, activation, and targeting in one platform, supporting both lead-based and account-based motions with precision

    Monday, Apr 20
    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Scaling Personalized Experiences in a Complex Energy Market [S709]

    , Program Manager Digital Innovation, Vattenfall Netherlands

    , Sr. Consultant, Merkle

    Delivering relevant, timely customer experiences at scale is critical as the energy market grows more competitive. Vattenfall, one of Europe’s largest energy providers, is transforming its customer engagement model. Florine Klop from Vattenfall NL and Diederik Kielbaey from Merkle share how the company is shifting from a channel‑centric approach to a unified, data‑driven experience engine. With a layered data foundation in Adobe Real-Time CDP and real‑time decisioning in Adobe Journey Optimizer, Vattenfall has built a scalable personalization framework that drives measurable business impact and lays the groundwork for true 1:1 experiences.

    Key takeaways:

    • How 450+ commercial offers were integrated into Adobe Journey Optimizer and activated with real‑time decisioning to increase relevance and conversion
    • How modular, reusable offers accelerate time to market and make large‑scale personalization sustainable
    • How marketing teams gain agility and ownership by orchestrating CX through Adobe’s platform

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Dentsu for marketing purposes.

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Customer Engagement, Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    ServiceNow’s Quest for Scalable Success with Automation and Gen AI [S927]

    , Principal Digital Strategist, Adobe

    , Director, Global Marketing Business Optimization, ServiceNow

    Most B2B marketing organizations don’t fail because of bad strategy: they fail because growth outpaces their operating model. As systems multiply and teams specialize, execution fragments and the customer experience breaks long before anyone realizes it.

     

    Discover how ServiceNow teamed with Adobe Support & Services to power its shift to scalable, buying-group marketing by modernizing its campaign and content operations. By establishing a standardized marketing hierarchy in Adobe Workfront Planning, automating workflows with Workfront Fusion, and centralizing campaign content in Adobe Experience Manager Assets, ServiceNow now operates with a single source of truth and a future-ready content engine that aligns teams, workflows, and data without losing cohesion.
     

    Key takeaways:

    • Build a scalable foundation for buying-group personalization powered by unified data, content, and workflows
    • Accelerate efficiency and impact through campaign operations grounded in automation and connected systems
    • Use standardized campaign metadata to unlock stronger reporting, smarter insights, and end-to-end automation
    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Firefly

    Chase Lindsley
    4:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Shred the Static Quo [OS760]

    , VP of Sales, Tiled

    , Douglas Elliman

    The most consequential moment in your revenue cycle is still being handled by a static file. The gap between how a brand shows up in the market and how it shows up in the deal is where revenue is being lost, quietly and consistently. The teams closing it aren't overhauling their tech stack, they're making a different decision about what they do with what they've already created, and what it does when it gets there.

    Key takeaways:
    •    The content winning the most competitive deals right now isn't being built by a bigger team with a bigger budget
    •    Learn how to make the shift from static-first to experience-first without rebuilding your entire content operation
    •    Discover what buyers do when they're not in the room with you, and why it's the most important data your team isn't looking at yet
     

    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, Analytics, B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Creative Cloud, Adobe Express
    • Tuesday, Apr 214:15 PM - 4:30 PM PDT
      (Wednesday, Apr 224:45 AM - 5:00 AM IST)

    Monday, Apr 20
    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    SHRM’s Journey to Connected, Mission-Driven Experiences [S701]

    The Society for Human Resource Management’s mission is to empower HR professionals and build better workplaces, but legacy systems and fragmented experiences made it difficult to deliver on that promise at scale. Recognizing the need for change, SHRM’s leadership aligned around a clear vision to modernize the digital ecosystem while keeping members, employees, and mission at the center. SHRM, PwC, and Adobe share how that vision became reality through a phased, outcomes-driven transformation. Beginning with a focused MVP and expanding into a connected experience platform, SHRM unified content, commerce, and data on Adobe Experience Cloud to simplify member journeys, energize internal teams, and drive measurable gains. Learn how leadership alignment, disciplined execution, and the right technology foundation delivered tangible results, including faster checkout, improved performance, and higher engagement, while laying the groundwork for future AI-enabled personalization and emerging commerce capabilities. Key takeaways:

    • A framework for earning executive buy-in for transformation
    • Lessons on driving engagement through connected content, commerce, and data
    • A forward-looking view of preparing for AI-enabled personalization

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with PwC for marketing purposes.

    Track: Commerce, Customer Data Management and Collaboration, Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Target, Adobe Commerce, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Marketo Measure, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Intermediate to advanced
    Include in embedded catalog
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Skill Exchange: 5 Key Areas to Address in Your Workfront Implementation [S908]

    , Adoption Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Lead Functional Architect, Merkle

    Workfront’s flexibility is one of its greatest strengths, but it can also be one of its biggest challenges. With so many ways to configure the platform, it’s easy to overbuild, overlook governance, or create an experience that’s great for admins but confusing for users. In this session, we’ll dig into the five essential pillars that help you implement, or optimize, Workfront with long-term success in mind — governance, reporting, user experience, maintenance, and documentation. You’ll learn how each area connects to the others and how a balanced approach ensures your system stays scalable, sustainable, and intuitive for every user.

    Key Takeaways:

    • A governance framework that works — establish clear ownership and decision-making that will keep your system clean and consistent, without slowing teams down.
    • User experience as a governance tool — discover how thoughtful design, naming conventions, and workflows reduce friction and boost adoption across your user base.
    • Sustainable systems management — understand how to audit, document, and deprecate effectively, so Workfront continues to evolve with your organization.
    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Workfront
    • Wednesday, Apr 229:00 AM - 10:00 AM PDT
      (9:30 PM - 10:30 PM IST)
      In-Person

    1:00 p.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    Skill Exchange: Accelerating Adobe Commerce Storefront Performance [S906]

    , Adoption Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Technical Lead, Blue Acorn iCi x Infosys

    Adobe Commerce storefronts have powered high-growth businesses for years, but with traffic shifting to mobile and Core Web Vitals tied to SEO and conversions, brands need faster performance without a full replatform. In this session, learn how enterprise brands are using Adobe Commerce storefronts powered by Edge Delivery Services, leveraging out-of-the-box capabilities to boost speed, authoring agility, and SEO visibility. See a real-world example where Lighthouse scores jumped into the mid-90s, driving stronger rankings and engagement. Discover an incremental roadmap to move high-value pages (homepage, PLP, PDP, landing pages) to the edge while keeping existing backend logic. We’ll share lessons learned, measurable outcomes, and a live demo of edge-powered publishing and Core Web Vitals improvements.

    Key Takeaways:

    • How to accelerate storefront performance with Adobe Commerce powered by Edge Delivery Services
    • Practical roadmap for incremental modernization without replatforming
    • Real-world results and live demo of Core Web Vitals improvements
    Track: Commerce
    Product: Adobe Commerce
    • Wednesday, Apr 221:00 PM - 2:00 PM PDT
      (Thursday, Apr 231:30 AM - 2:30 AM IST)
      In-Person

    Skill Exchange: Agentic AI in CJA — Automate the Daily Analytics Grind [S905]

    , Sr. Customer Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Consultant, Data & Insights, Blue Acorn iCi

    If your daily routine still includes manually brewing dashboards and chasing insights, it’s time for a refill. AI Assistant in Customer Journey Analytics, fueled by Data Insights Agent, helps you skip the morning rush by automating analysis and speeding time-to-insight. In this session, we’ll explore how agentic AI in CJA supports faster, guided analysis across skill levels and enables conversational, on-demand exploration of data and visualizations. Learn practical ways to apply AI to attribution and forecasting using prompts and workflows that make AI your favorite coworker behind the counter — serving insights hot, fresh, and ready to fuel smarter, faster decisions — no extra espresso shots required.

    In the session, you will gain insights around:

    • Automating the analytical morning rush and move from building dashboards to interpreting insights
    • Learning the  AI-powered prompts that speed analysis and help teams level up together
    • Using AI to clarify attribution and forecasting so decision making gets faster and more accurate
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    1:00 p.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    Skill Exchange: AI Prioritization Framework and Playbook for Marketo Engage [S907]

    , Adoption Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , VP of AI & Automation, Revenue Pulse

    , Sr. Manager, Marketing Operations and Automation, Bonterra

    AI is revolutionizing B2B marketing by speeding up content creation, scaling personalization, and accelerating pipeline velocity. However, these benefits come with risks that need to be managed. This peer-led session will demonstrate AI's impact on B2B marketing with practical examples tied to business metrics like CTR, lead velocity, and campaign SLAs. Admins will leave with templates, prompts, and tools to deploy the first use cases.  

    Key takeaways: 

    • Learn a framework to assess AI risks, including PII, brand voice, bias, hallucination, and human-in-the-loop approvals.  
    • Explore an implementation playbook by risk level to:  
      • boost efficiency and quality, with human-reviewed outputs using the new Email Designer and Custom GPT for Velocity Scripts. 
      • integrate AI into low-risk processes, such as using Interactive Webinars GenAI features and AI persona segment classification via Webhooks.  
      • create guardrails for AI-assisted nurture orchestration and AI person scoring aligned to your lifecycle. 
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Marketo Engage

    Skill Exchange: Designing Connected Commerce Journeys with Adobe [OS953]

    , Strategy Director - Digital Commerce & Marketing Technologies, CI&T

    In this Skill Exchange session, we explore how organizations can design connected, data-driven commerce journeys by translating customer and account signals into scalable, intent-aware experiences.

    The session focuses on practical decision frameworks for activating data across in-session commerce moments and cross-channel journeys. Attendees will learn how to determine where relevance should happen in real time and when orchestration is required across longer, more complex buying journeys. The approach applies to both B2C and B2B commerce scenarios, including multi-stakeholder and assisted sales models, with Adobe technologies used as the enabling platform.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to design connected commerce journeys using intent and account-level signals
    • How to decide between in-session relevance and cross-channel orchestration across complex buying journeys
    • Practical patterns for scaling relevance and reducing friction across B2C and B2B commerce scenarios
    Track: Commerce
    Product: Adobe Commerce

    , Practice Lead, Adobe Workfront, EMMsphere

    , VP, Creative Technology Operations, Citi

    Rolling out Workfront to thousands of users across multiple creative and compliance teams can feel like solving a Rubik’s Cube blindfolded. Join Carol Thomas-Knipes, Vice President, DAM & Workfront Program Lead at Citi and Daniel Clarke, Workfront Practice Lead at EMMsphere as they share how Citi tackled a complex cross-team implementation with a focus on creating simple processes, leveraging automation to reduce friction, and adopting an iterative approach to drive lasting adoption. You’ll walk away with real-world lessons on designing and adapting Workfront experiences that drive adoption and lasting engagement.

    In this session, you'll hear:

    • How to simplify to amplify — learn how streamlined workflows and automation unlock greater user engagement and adoption
    • Ways to iterate with empathy — explore how an agile, user-first approach turns rollout challenges into opportunities for growth and connection

    , Business Architecture Manager, Accenture

    Bringing Customer Journey Analytics to life can feel a little like mad science, but with the right setup, your creation can be a masterpiece, not a monster. In this session, learn how to build a strong CJA foundation the right way — choosing between the Adobe Analytics Connector and AEP SDK, designing a scalable schema, planning your identity strategy, and setting up governance that empowers analysts. You’ll leave with practical steps to future-proof your implementation for activation across the AEP Platform, and the confidence that your masterpiece won’t turn on you.

    Takeaways:

    • Learn key steps for a smooth, scalable CJA implementation.
    • Understand schema, identity, and governance best practices.
    • Discover how to future-proof your setup for activation for AJO and RT-CDP.

    , VP of Content Supply Chain Architecture, WorkFocus.io

    , VP Integrated Marketing Technology Platforms, Natixis Investment Managers

    Integrating Workfront and AEM is more than connecting tools, it’s about unifying the way your business works. In this session, we’ll explore how to align metadata, workflows, and taxonomy so your systems “speak” the same operational language. We'll also talk about how to use Workfront Planning to define and govern metadata before it flows into Workfront and AEM workflows, creating a shared foundation that drives automation, collaboration, and clarity across teams.

    , Sr. eCommerce Analyst, Staples Canada

    Having clean, easy-to-read dashboards is an integral part of reporting. Whether you’re working on a basic, ad-hoc report or building a one-stop-shop dashboard for your business partners, there are a wide range of visualizations that you can use to convey your data.

    Learn how to:

    • Use best practices to declutter your freeform tables.
    • Join your tables to visualizations to display your data.
    • Use advanced visualizations to tell the story of your customer’s journey.

    Skill Exchange Spotlight: Turning Data into Impactful Journeys [S902]

    , Adoption Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , IT Architect, Ulta Beauty

    , Digital Marketing Developer, Wegmans

    This session features two spotlights designed to help teams unlock personalization at scale with Adobe Experience Platform. The first spotlight deep-dives into how Federated Audience Composition enables activating enriched attributes without loading data into the CDP profile store, reducing operational effort and accelerating enterprise-wide personalization. The second spotlight focuses on journey execution in Adobe Journey Optimizer, showing how to translate real-time and batch data into dynamic customer journeys, trigger events, apply conditions, and personalize content leveraging data from the CDP. Together, both spotlights provide a practical view of how federated data and journey orchestration work hand-in-hand to deliver scalable, measurable customer impact.

    Key Takeaways:

    • Learn how to design and launch data-driven journeys in Journey Optimizer using real-time signals and batch data.
    • Understand best practices for applying personalization logic, conditions, and dynamic attributes in journeys.
    • Discover how Federated Audience Composition activates enriched data without ingestion to accelerate personalization at scale.
    Track: Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Wednesday, Apr 22
    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Skill Exchange: Tag your Tagging — Change Monitoring Made Easy [S904]

    , Sr. Customer Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Staff Marketing Technologies Engineer, Credit Acceptance

    Unexpected feature changes, delayed app updates, and even website caching can wreak havoc on your Adobe Analytics data. Together we'll create a Change Monitoring dashboard that shows when, how, and why tracking changes occur across your digital ecosystem, turning potential headaches into insights by proactively answering the most common data quality questions you have. Using Core extension data elements in Data Collection Tags, we will:

    • Create eVars and props that allow us to surface unplanned or delayed updates, validate releases, and detect issues before they impact reporting.
    • Use these same dimensions to create a workspace to track changes, spot anomalies, and confirm version parity across environments, and to confirm that when we see something unexpected, we have the blueprint for remediation.

    Whether you manage implementation, reporting, or both, you will be empowered to transform analytics maintenance into a strategic advantage — and make data confidence a shared responsibility.

    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics
    • Wednesday, Apr 229:00 AM - 10:00 AM PDT
      (9:30 PM - 10:30 PM IST)

    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Skill Exchange: The Art of Data Harmony to Drive Personalization at Scale [S903]

    , Adoption Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Director of Global Digital Technology, Universal Destinations and Experiences

    “You can’t personalize what you can’t trust.” Most Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) implementations fail without reliable, high-quality data. Join AEP Champion TJ Jana, on how to establish a real-time data quality governance framework that keeps AEP, Real-Time CDP, and Adobe Journey Optimizer data accurate, complete, and activation ready. 

     

    You will learn how to design schema guardrails, validate identity stitching, and monitor ingestion quality to prevent personalization breakdowns. Discover how clean data enhances offer decisioning accuracy, improves profile trust, and reduces wasted costs. Walk away with practical methods to measure and operationalize data quality as a continuous discipline — because data quality isn’t IT hygiene, it’s experience quality. 

     

    Key takeaways: 
    • Implement schema and identity governance for trusted personalization 
    • Use native tools to monitor and remediate data issues in real time 
    • Link data quality metrics directly to activation accuracy and ROI 

      

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP

    4:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Skill Exchange: Tracking the Invisible Journey in AI Search Analytics [OS951]

    , Sr. Analytics Manager - AI & Analytics, IBM

    AI search is rewriting the rules of discovery. Conversations and summaries now replace the classic search click, reshaping how customers find your brand and leaving gaps in traditional analytics. Learn how to uncover these hidden journeys using Adobe Analytics. Detect and segment traffic influenced by AI platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE. Create meaningful classifications, apply Attribution IQ to reveal AI’s assisted impact on conversions, and visualize emerging patterns in Analysis Workspace. Leave with a repeatable framework to help your organization measure what AI search makes invisible, and stay ahead as discovery becomes increasingly conversational. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • Spot when AI search influences your traffic
    • Label and group AI-driven visits using segments and classifications
    • Measure and visualize AI impact on conversions
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics

  • Session
    Skill Exchange
    Tips and Tricks
    Online

    Adobe Workfront
    Workflow and Planning
    Intermediate to Advanced
    Executive
    Martech Professional
    Project Manager
    Operations Marketer
    Double Bookable
    <br><a href="https://business.adobe.com/summit/2026/sessions/skill-exchange-when-users-shape-workfront-they-cha-os954.html target=_blank">Watch</a><br>
    Intermediate to advanced
    Include in embedded catalog
    12:00 p.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Skill Exchange: When Users Shape Workfront, They Champion It [OS954]

    , Technical Architecture Associate Manager, Accenture

    Workfront adoption doesn't begin at go-live. It begins when people feel heard.

    You have gathered your internal Workfront champions and subject matter experts, but real engagement happens when you make them active participants, not just observers. Building an early workflow prototype gives users a clear, working model to explore. It doesn't need to include every detail but should demonstrate how Workfront will support their work. Letting users test it in mock scenarios uncovers challenges early and builds confidence. This hands-on experience turns passive reviewers into passionate contributors. When user feedback shapes the system, trust grows. They own the change and become advocates, sharing how this will make their work smoother, smarter, and more rewarding.

    In this session, you will hear:

    • Practical steps to turn your champions into co-creators through early, hands-on engagement
    • Ways to use Workfront as a feedback engine to drive continuous improvement and deepen user ownership
    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Workfront
    • Monday, Apr 2012:30 PM - 12:45 PM PDT
      (Tuesday, Apr 211:00 AM - 1:15 AM IST)

    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Sony PlayStation’s Strategic Implementation of Customer Journey Analytics [S111]

    , Director of Product Management, Adobe Analytics, Adobe

    , Engineering Manager, Sony Interactive Entertainment

    , Manager, Analytics Engineering, PlayStation

    Evolving from Adobe Analytics to Adobe Customer Journey Analytics is as much an organizational transformation as it is a technology change. Learn how Sony Interactive Entertainment approached the move to Customer Journey Analytics as a strategic initiative, aligning teams, redefining success metrics, and building confidence in a new source of truth across the organization. Hear how PlayStation navigated the shift from channel-centric reporting to customer-centric journey analysis, managed stakeholder expectations during data transitions, and ensured alignment on metric and attribution changes. Get governance models, communication strategies, and change-management practices that helped drive adoption across marketing, product, and analytics teams. Gain practical guidance on leading a Customer Journey Analytics evolution as a business transformation, ensuring trust in insights, accelerating organizational buy-in, and enabling data-driven decision-making at scale.

    Key takeaways:

    • How PlayStation positioned Customer Journey Analytics as a strategic transformation, not just a tool migration
    • Change-management and governance practices that build trust in new analytics frameworks
    • Lessons learned for aligning teams around customer-centric measurement 
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    12:00 p.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Speed to Value with Adobe Customer Journey Analytics [OS751]

    , Senior Manager, Data & Analytics, Zilker Trail

    Most organizations treat the transition from Adobe Analytics to Customer Journey Analytics as a grueling technical migration that takes months — if not years — to show value. But in a world where data-driven decisions can’t wait, "slow" is no longer an option. Join the experts from Zilker Trail as we reveal the blueprint for bypassing traditional bottlenecks and achieving actionable cross-channel insights in as little as 30 days. See how our proven path to proficiency solves the most common “analysis paralysis” hurdles using a KPI-first methodology and Customer Journey Analytics frameworks. Whether you’re a head of digital, a product lead, or an analyst, this session is designed to demystify the process of moving to Customer Journey Analytics.

    Key takeaways:

    • Roadmaps needed to transform your Adobe stack into a high-velocity engine for revenue and customer lifetime value
    • How to stop managing your tools and start mastering your data—fast
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    Stagwell’s Approach to Scaling Without Sacrificing Autonomy [S926]

    , Global CTO, Stagwell

    , Principal Digital Strategist, Adobe

    Modern marketing organizations are scaling through acquisitions, specialization, and global expansion, but with that growth comes operational fragmentation. As AI accelerates content creation and activation, organizations must find new ways to align teams without slowing them down. Learn how Stagwell, a network of over 70 independent agencies, partnered with Adobe Support and Services to build a connected content ecosystem that enables scale without enforcing rigid standardization. At the center is “The Machine,” Stagwell’s internal platform where workflows, assets, data, and AI are orchestrated across planning, creation, and activation. By leveraging Adobe Workfront and Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Stagwell created enterprise visibility into content status, usage, and readiness while allowing agencies to maintain their own ways of working. See how this approach enables faster content reuse, reduces friction in activation, and prepares organizations for AI-driven workflows while preserving autonomy and brand differentiation.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to scale marketing operations through orchestration instead of process standardization
    • Strategies for connecting workflows, assets, and data to enable AI-ready content systems
    • Best practices for creating enterprise visibility and governance without limiting team autonomy
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Experience Manager Assets
    • Monday, Apr 2010:00 AM - 11:00 AM PDT
      (10:30 PM - 11:30 PM IST)
      In-Person

    Structured Experimentation as Enterprise Readiness [CP26]

    , Senior Manager, Firefly Enterprise Product Marketing, Adobe

    , Senior Director, Creative & Marketing Operations, Serta Simmons Bedding

    In a rapidly evolving landscape, digital transformation rarely moves in a straight line. Success is defined not by the number of AI experiments an organization runs, but by how those experiments are structured within enterprise systems to meet sudden operational mandates. Join leaders from Serta Simmons Bedding, Stagwell, and Adobe for an inside look at how they transitioned from experimental AI proofs of concept to a mission-critical content infrastructure.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to develop AI workflows inside enterprise platforms so that they can scale without being rebuilt from scratch
    • Leveraging the Content Supply Chain (CSC) framework to ensure that your AI strategy is cumulative and prepared for unexpected business surges
    • How Serta, a 150-year mattress brand, elevated its digital presence with consumers with a connected content engine
    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Firefly, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Creative Production, Adobe Firefly Custom Models, Adobe Firefly Design Intelligence

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Summit Bash [GS6]

    Get ready for an unforgettable night at the Adobe Summit Bash at AREA15. This year we'll have multi-platinum selling rock band, Barenaked Ladies followed by multi-platinum, Grammy-winning producer and artist Timbaland.

    The main stage will be located outdoors in the West Lot, so please dress accordingly. And don’t miss the vibes in A Lot, where Careless Whisper your favorite 80s cover band will be serving up nostalgic hits from open until 8:15pm.

    AREA15 has leveled up since your last visit. Dive into the all new Zone 2 packed with immersive, high-energy experiences. Challenge your crew at Game Depot, step into the spotlight at the Great Big Game Show, and explore mind-bending adventures like Interstellar Arc and Looper. Crack codes at The Escape Game or face your fears at Universal Horror Unleashed. Come early, wander often, and make the night your own, this Bash is more than a party, it’s a playground.

    Map coming soon!

    Supercharge Content Workflows with Adobe Experience Manager Assets and Workfront [L411]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Learn how Adobe Workfront and Adobe Experience Manager Assets work together to power a more efficient content supply chain, helping marketing and creative teams streamline asset delivery, reduce duplicate content creation, and improve asset discoverability at scale. We’ll walk through the end-to-end workflow for storing final assets in Adobe Experience Manager directly from Workfront and how you can reuse approved content across campaigns, channels, and teams. Through guided exercises, you’ll configure asset flows, publish final outputs, and apply best practices that support a “create once, reuse everywhere” approach to content.

    Key takeaways:

    • Understand how integrating Adobe Experience Manager Assets with Adobe Workfront enables greater visibility, stronger collaboration, and faster time to market
    • Reduce duplication by creating once and reusing everywhere
    • Discover how to deliver consistent, high-quality content across the content supply chain
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Assets

    Take-off with Fusion! Go from 0 to Integration in 90 Minutes [L821]

    , Principal Customer Success Architect, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    Develop practical skills in using design documents, and gain integration development best practices.     Test Before You Launch: AI Synthetic Customers and Trusted Personalization [CP1]

    Most organizations are still guessing before they launch. PwC demonstrates how synthetic customers — AI-powered audience simulations grounded in real behavioral and consent data — help marketers test messaging, content, journeys, and offers before they go live in Adobe. See how AI-driven personalization can be pressure-tested for performance, privacy, and brand alignment, turning experimentation into measurable impact. Because the future of marketing isn’t just intelligent. It’s intelligently governed.

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with PwC for marketing purposes.

    Test, Optimize and Personalize Experiences with Adobe Target [TRN12]

    , Principal Instructor, Adobe

    Please bring your own device to participate in the hands-on demonstrations during this session. 

     

    This one-day session provides key features needed to tailor and personalize your customers’ experiences.  You'll discover how offers perform across customer journeys, personalize more deeply by blending Target audiences with other Adobe Experience Cloud audiences, and increase the value of your activities by joining together profile data from different sources on the fly to enable real-time personalization.  

     

    This course will help prepare you for the Adobe Target Optimization Specialist Professional certification exam and the Adobe Target Business Practitioner Professional certification exam.

    Track: Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Target
    Purchase Required: $850 in addition to the required in-person full conference pass Visit Attendee Dashboard.

    Monday, Apr 20
    The Agentic Content Supply Chain Playbook: Orchestrating Multi‑Agent Workflows [S403]

    , Sr. Director, Product Marketing, GenStudio Solution, Adobe

    , Head of Product Marketing, Firefly Enterprise, Adobe

    You’re hearing a lot about the promise of AI agents, yet most teams aren’t sure how to navigate this rapidly growing landscape or translate it into real operational value. Agentic AI becomes transformative when it’s seamlessly integrated into purposeful, end‑to‑end human–agent workflows, not simply used as scattered features or one‑off assistants. Learn how to orchestrate human-agent collaboration to modernize your content supply chain for the AI world. Move beyond ad hoc AI tools and conversational helpers and start building human‑led, agent‑accelerated systems where agents execute with precision and efficiency across your entire content supply chain.

    The winners in the AI era will be the ones who build connected AI workflows — not just adopt isolated AI capabilities. Learn how to help your teams move faster, maintain quality, and modernize your end-to-end content supply chain.

    Key takeaways:

    • Tips for creating effective agent orchestration
    • Patterns for orchestrating multi‑step, multi‑agent workflows
    • How to align agents to your existing content processes
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe GenStudio

    , Director of Engineering, Adobe

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    The way teams work in Adobe Experience Manager is changing—fast. Agentic workflows are turning time-consuming production tasks into natural, conversational interactions. Experiment with Adobe Experience Manager agents that build pages, update content, and orchestrate complex workflows. Discover how agentic capabilities boost productivity, enhance consistency, and help your organization get to market faster.

    • Discover how conversational workflows reduce production time by eliminating manual, repetitive steps
    • Understand how agentic tools improve content quality and governance through consistent, repeatable, and policy-aligned actions

    The Agentic Shift — Reimagining Marketing Operations with Amazon Ads [S742]

    , Chief Strategy Officer, LeapPoint, an OPM Company

    With AI, multichannel fragmentation, and personalization demands converging, the old marketing playbook is broken. Experts from Omnicom and Amazon Ads reveal how forward-thinking organizations are thinking about and building agentic marketing operations where intelligent automation, work orchestration, and unified channel management work in concert to reclaim speed, eliminate manual chaos, unlock real competitive advantage, and meet customers where they are. Walk away with a roadmap for transforming your marketing ops into an intelligent growth-focused engine.

    Key takeaways:

    • Hear how Amazon Ads is optimizing its workflow and content foundation with Adobe tech to streamline workflows across teams, channels, and campaigns
    • Explore how unified data governance, spanning cultural, commerce, and consumer insights, is essential as AI enables decision-making at more granular levels across functions
    • Discover how governance frameworks must evolve to enable faster, smarter decision-making while maintaining control and compliance in an agentic world

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Omnicom for marketing purposes.

    The Agentic Workflow: MLB Blueprint for Fan Insights with Google Cloud [S748]

    , SVP Product, MLB

    , Senior Product Manager, Google

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    MLB is excited to act as customer zero, collaborating with Google Cloud and Adobe to break the data bottleneck and chart a new course for fan engagement. By leveraging the Adobe Marketing Agent and Google Gemini Enterprise, MLB can simplify workflows and enhance data-driven outcomes. Too often, critical fan insights — ranging from campaign performance to granular audience segments — are locked behind complex interfaces and specialist silos, hindering the speed of decision-making. This groundbreaking integration puts the power of Adobe Experience Platform and Adobe Agent Orchestrator directly into the hands of all MLB teams, not just data scientists. Now, any team member can gain instant, real-time fan insights and simplify audience segmentation simply by asking questions in natural language, all from a single pane of glass in Gemini Enterprise.

    Key takeaways:

    • Get immediate, conversational answers on campaign performance for specific market segments
    • Interpret and refine complex fan audiences without writing complex queries
    • Generate highly relevant, personalized content based on customer behavior and segment insights

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Google for marketing purposes.

    Track: AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends

    The Change Management Blueprint for Customer Journey Analytics [OS115]

    , Director of Business Transformation, Adswerve

    , Head of Digital Experience, Adswerve

    Unlocking the full value of Adobe Customer Journey Analytics requires more than a simple lift and shift from device-based reporting. It demands a fundamental shift in mindset — reorienting teams, processes, and success metrics around the customer journey. Join Jake Winter and Nicki Hagen from Adswerve as they reveal the change management blueprint for moving an organization from legacy tracking to journey-led growth.

    Key takeaways:

    • Journey-centric governance: Move beyond vanity metrics to KPIs that track the customer’s cross-channel reality
    • Change management at scale: Strategies for putting people at the center of your digital transformation to ensure long-term tool stickiness
    • Operational evolution: Learn how to break down departmental silos to foster a collaborative analysis environment
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Enterprises worldwide are racing to integrate AI into real workflows at scale. Join our product leaders to discover how agentic collaborators can accelerate delivery, enhance collaboration, and improve quality while seamlessly integrating into your team and existing processes.
    Key takeaways:

    • Create an agentic collaborator for review
    • Deploy it against real Adobe Workfront projects or workflows, and collaborate with it in real time
    • Monitor results and provide instructions
    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Workfront

    Monday, Apr 20
    The Evolution of Digital Experiences in Telecom [S917]

    , Practice Lead – Telecom and Media, Digital Strategy Group, Adobe

    , General Manager, Services Customer Engagement, Adobe

    Telecom brands are redefining how they build lasting customer relationships in the age of AI, striving to deliver contextual experiences that proactively address needs and reduce friction. What separates today's leaders is their ability to orchestrate personalized experiences at massive scale, while accelerating time-to-market and unlocking operational efficiency.

    Join Adobe leaders for a look at where experience orchestration in telecom is headed – and what it takes to get there.

    In this session:

    • Insights from Adobe's telecom industry research, including shifting consumer preferences and behaviors across the customer lifecycle
    • Top telecom experience orchestration use cases enabled by Adobe, from acquisition through growth, care and support, and retention
    • Organizational and operating model considerations for AI-led success – key principles for structuring teams and processes
    Track: Workflow and Planning, Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    The Future of Experimentation: How Agentic AI is Fueling Smarter Growth [S523]

    , Principal Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Product Manager, Adobe

    As brands run more tests, many still face familiar challenges — siloed learnings, unclear ROI, difficulty knowing why experiments work, and a shortage of actionable ideas to drive growth. Adobe Journey Optimizer Experimentation Accelerator introduces an AI-first approach that pinpoints causal drivers behind lift and conversion, surfaces high-impact test ideas aligned to business goals, and rapidly iterates best-performing variants within live experiments. By unifying insights, generative test ideation, and adaptive experimentation, you can move faster, fuel smarter decisions, and scale experimentation programs that fuel continuous growth.  

    Key takeaways:   

    • Uncover what’s driving test performance using AI-led insights that strengthen experimentation strategies and improve decision-making   
    • See how agentic and generative AI uncover high-impact test ideas tied to predicted lift and business KPIs   
    • Understand how adaptive experiments accelerate optimization, activating new variants mid-flight to maximize ROI
    Track: Customer Engagement
    Product: Adobe Target, Adobe Journey Optimizer Experimentation Accelerator, Adobe Journey Optimizer
