    The Future of Fan Engagement: NFL, PGA Tour, 49ers and Fox on Trusted AI [S702]

    , Chief Marketing Officer, San Francisco 49ers

    , VP Digital, PGA Tour

    , DSG Principal, Sports, Adobe

    As brands compete not just on the field but for fan attention across every digital touchpoint, AI- and data-driven personalization powered by Adobe has become a decisive competitive advantage. In this PwC-moderated panel, leaders from across sports and entertainment explore how leagues, teams, and media platforms are using Adobe Experience Platform, advanced analytics, and AI to deliver trusted, personalized fan engagement at scale. From stadiums to streaming, panelists share real-world examples of how unified data, real-time insights, and AI-driven activation are transforming the end-to-end fan journey, driving deeper loyalty, measurable growth, and new revenue opportunities. The discussion also addresses how organizations are embedding trust through responsible data use, privacy, consent management, and AI governance to ensure that innovation doesn’t outpace integrity.

    Key takeaways:

    • How leading organizations use Adobe AI and data to scale fan engagement and what’s next for AI-powered engagement in sports and entertainment
    • Practical examples of personalization driving loyalty and revenue
    • What “trusted AI” means in practice and how to operationalize it

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with PwC for marketing purposes.

    Track: Analytics, Customer Engagement, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends

    The Human + AI Advantage: Lumen’s ABM Transformation with Adobe GenStudio [S230]

    , Manager, Product Marketing GenStudio, Adobe

    , VP, Brand & DX, Lumen

    Lumen is transforming how B2B marketing operates by empowering marketing teams with AI agents designed to deliver account based marketing results. In this session you’ll learn how Lumen scaled AI-powered Account Based Marketing with Adobe GenStudio to up-skill their workforce and personalize their campaigns including paid media, email, content marketing, and video use cases.

    Learning outcomes

    • ABM with AI that performs: How to target, create, and activate account-specific content at scale with GenStudio + Firefly.
    • Uplevel the team, not replace it: Practical steps to super charge creative resources and empower marketers.
    • Move spend in-house: Structure, tooling, and guardrails to shift multi-million-dollar outsourced work to agile internal production.
    • Own the outcome: How Adobe’s newest agents connect planning, creation, activation, and measurement so marketers can run ABM end-to-end.

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    The New Era of Customer Engagement: Turning Moments into Lifetime Value [SK3]

    , VP Experience Platform, Real-time Customer Data Platform & Customer Journey Products, Adobe

    , VP, Go-To-Market Technologies, Intuit

    , Digital Marketing Technical Evangelist, Adobe

    , Manager, Product Management, Adobe

    , Senior Director of Product Management, B2B Customer Journey Management, Neolane, Adobe

    Customer experience isn’t created in a single moment - it’s built over time through meaningful, connected engagement. In this Strategy keynote, discover how leading brands are using AI-powered insights to unify customer data, orchestrate journeys, and personalize engagement across channels in real time. Learn how shifting focus from channel execution and short-term conversions to intelligent, customer-driven engagement enables stronger relationships at every stage of the lifecycle - from acquisition and activation to loyalty and advocacy.

    Join Adobe's Sundeep Parsa, Vice President of Adobe Product, and Anoop Sreenivasan, Intuit's Vice President, Go-To-Market Technologies, as they share a strategic framework for modern customer engagement. Visionary demos will showcase how AI-driven intelligence and agentic experiences help teams break down silos, move faster, and continuously adapt engagement to customer needs - turning moments into lasting relationships and lifetime value.

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration, B2B Customer Journeys, Customer Engagement, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Campaign, Adobe Target, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP Collaboration, Adobe GenAI, Adobe Content Analytics, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition, Adobe Real-Time CDP B2B Edition, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Journey Optimizer Experimentation Accelerator, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics B2B Edition

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    The New Front Door to Commerce is AI. Are You Ready? [S303]

    , Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Group Product Manager, Adobe

    AI agents are rapidly becoming the new front door to commerce, helping shoppers discover products, compare options, and even complete purchases. As LLM-driven interfaces replace traditional browsing, how do you stay visible, trusted, and in control in the era of agentic commerce? From capabilities like Adobe Catalog Agent and Adobe Commerce integration into Brand Concierge to native support for emerging agentic protocols such as UCP and ACP, Adobe Commerce enables brands to be discoverable across AI-native shopping channels while maintaining governance, data integrity, and direct customer relationships that fuel long-term growth and loyalty.

    Key takeaways:

    • What agentic commerce means for brands as discovery and transactions move beyond storefronts into AI-powered experiences
    • How to participate in agentic commerce at scale
    • How Adobe Commerce is helping merchants confidently navigate the shift agentic commerce
    Track: Commerce
    Product: Adobe Commerce

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    The New Rules of Brand Visibility: What It Takes to Win [S749]

    , CMO, Semrush

    As AI systems increasingly shape how people discover and evaluate brands, visibility is no longer only about ranking — it’s about being selected. Andrew Warden, CMO of Semrush, explores how AI is changing the rules of visibility and what it takes to stand out when LLMs act as gatekeepers. From the evolving role of SEO to the importance of authority, originality, and consistent brand signals, gain a clear framework for building visibility that drives real impact in an AI-driven world.

    Key takeaways:

    • How visibility is shaped when AI systems become the gatekeepers of discovery
    • The role of SEO when linked with agentic search optimization
    • The signals that drive visibility today: authority, originality, and cross-channel consistency

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Semrush for marketing purposes.

    , Head of Global AI Strategy, Adobe

    , Chief Digital and Technology Officer, Air India

    Delivering on agentic ROI is about more than the technology — human-centered adoption is critical. Creating an agentic layer and planning for interoperability are technical steps toward success. Tackling how to roll out change management, show AI agents as a partner for the team, and upskill your workforce takes planning. Hear how companies across industries are integrating agentic AI with a proven framework.

    • Integrating internally and externally built agents

    Customer data platforms are an essential enabler to an audience-led, enterprise-scale marketing strategy. Behind the customer experience leaders who set forth the vision of what’s possible, teams on the ground often battle a reality of organizational silos and communication gaps to bring that vision to life.     The Power of Audience Agent: Manage and Create Audiences at Scale [OS511]

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Director, Expert Solutions Consulting, Adobe

    AI is transforming how marketers build, understand, and activate audiences—but realizing its full value requires more than new features. Teams must rethink how AI fits into their everyday workflows, operating models, and audience strategies.

    In this online session, you’ll see how Audience Agent, powered by Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, help teams better streamline their audience management and creation workflows.

    This session focuses on how to operationalize AI-powered audience capabilities at scale: where to apply automation, how to validate AI-assisted outputs, and how to balance speed with trust. Attendees will leave with an understanding of how to use Audience Agent to complement their existing workflows.

    • Where Audience Agent can deliver the most value for your organization and marketing teams

    The Unified Intelligence Engine: A Single Insights Platform for the NFL [S110]

    , Sr. Director, Product Management, Adobe

    , Lead, Fan Engagement Marketing Optimization, NFL

    As organizations scale, fragmented analytics — disconnected tools, inconsistent metrics, and siloed teams — slow insights and erode trust. To solve these challenges, the Adobe Analytics portfolio is evolving into a unified insights platform built on shared identity, processing, data transformation, and AI‑powered learnings. Learn about key evolutions in the Adobe Analytics portfolio to standardize decision-making across 95% of use cases. Hear how the NFL is using the Adobe Analytics portfolio to implement unified analytics outcomes that leaders care about most: faster decisions, greater alignment, speed to value, and scalable growth.

    Key takeaways:

    • The evolution of the NFL’s measurement framework to support analytics, journey measurement, and overall insights and optimization
    • How to eliminate conflicting metrics
    • Support new personas and use cases without adding tools or redefining metrics

    Tips and Tricks to Become a Pro at Journey Optimizer [S521]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Director & Enterprise Architect, Adobe

    Go beyond the basics with Adobe Journey Optimizer in this expert-led session designed to uncover powerful capabilities that drive real business impact. Whether you're just starting out or looking to refine your customer engagement strategy, you'll walk away with actionable insights to elevate your campaigns and journeys. 

    In this session: 

    • Proven methods to maximize journey and campaign effectiveness 

    • Hidden gems — underused but high-impact features

    Tips and Tricks To Maximize Agentic Capabilities in Adobe Workfront [L823]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    Get hands-on with the latest agentic features in Workfront! In this lab you’ll walk through guided exercises that mirror real marketing and creative operations scenarios: designing a Workfront Planning workspace for end-to-end visibility, converting an uploaded brief into structured planning records, using AI to keep delivery on track by managing tasks and milestones, accelerating content review with multi-stage approvals and an AI-powered content reviewer, and asking questions in natural language to surface actionable insights from your work ecosystem.
    Key takeaways:
    •    Transform a creative brief into a structured record type
    •    Set up a content review flow, including use of the Content Reviewer powered by AI
    •    Use natural language questions to unlock insights instantly
    •    Build and optimize a Planning workspace

    Track: Workflow and Planning
    Product: Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    Monday, Apr 20
    Top 5 AI Trends and What They Mean for Your Content Supply Chain [OS407]

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    The future of marketing demands more than speed — it requires intelligence. AI is reshaping the content supply chain, enabling creatives and marketers to move from ideation to execution with unprecedented efficiency. Explore how AI can catalyze ideation, accelerate workflows, and feed analytics back into the system for continuous improvement. Discover how AI transforms marketing organizations into agile, insight-driven engines that are ready for agentic consumption. Join us for a thought-provoking look at the future of marketing operations and how to prepare your content supply chain for the next wave of innovation in an AI-first world.  

    Key takeaways:

    • Understand how AI accelerates ideation and execution, enabling marketing teams to deliver content faster and smarter
    • Learn how to integrate analytics into your content supply chain for continuous improvement and adaptability
    • Discover strategies to future-proof your content supply chain for emerging agentic technologies and next-generation customer experiences

     

    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe GenStudio
    • Monday, Apr 2011:00 AM - 11:15 AM PDT
      (11:30 PM - 11:45 PM IST)

    Transforming your Content Supply Chain for the AI World [SK4]

    , VP, Brand & DX, Lumen

    , VP of Strategy and Product, Adobe GenStudio, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    , Digital Marketing Technical Evangelist, GenStudio & Content Supply Chain, Adobe

    AI isn’t just accelerating content creation, it’s restructuring the entire content economy and redefining what speed, scale, and relevance mean. Most content supply chains were never built for this level of content demand, and collapse under the weight of real-time personalization, exploding content formats, and new intelligent channels. Learn how forward-leaning brands turn this pressure into progress by building a content supply chain for the AI world — shifting from static, linear workflows to dynamic agentic systems where humans guide strategy and AI agents orchestrate execution. See how customers are using Adobe GenStudio to power this transformation — unifying planning, creation, activation, and insights into an intelligent engine that learns and improves with every campaign.

    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Content Supply Chain for the AI World, Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Cloud, Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Firefly, Adobe Express, Adobe GenAI, Adobe Frame.io, Adobe GenStudio, Adobe Content Analytics, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe Firefly Foundry, Adobe Firefly Services, Adobe Firefly Creative Production, Adobe Firefly Custom Models, Adobe Firefly Design Intelligence, Adobe GenStudio for Connected TV , Adobe GenStudio Content Marketing , Adobe GenStudio for Creative Production

    Transform the Customer Journey with an AI‑Powered Data Foundation [S509]

    , Head of Product, Adobe Advertising, Adobe

    , Director Digital and Experience, RMIT University

    RMIT University is revolutionizing student engagement by unifying its global marketing ecosystem on Adobe Experience Platform and augmenting with agentic AI solutions. This transformation delivers real‑time insights, smarter segmentation, and more personalized experiences across every channel. Learn how RMIT has paired this transformation with internal Adobe and external integrations to expand its reputation as a world leader in education.

    Key takeaways:

    • How a unified data foundation enables consistent, multichannel engagement across long and complex customer journeys
    • How agentic AI tools like Data Insight Agent and Audience Agent unlock faster insights and more effective audience strategies
    • How RMIT is preparing for AI‑powered content automation, translation, and hyper‑personalization with Adobe Real-Time CDP, Customer Journey Analytics, and Adobe Advertising

     

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Advertising , Adobe Target, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics B2B Edition

    Monday, Apr 20
    Turning Reporting Chaos into Clarity with a CEO Dashboard [OS216]

    , Director of Marketing Data and Operations, Nasdaq Inc.

    , VP of Client Services and Delivery, GNW Consulting

    Disconnected reports across Marketing, Sales, and Finance make it difficult for executives to trust the numbers or act with confidence. Learn how to turn fragmented reporting into a unified, executive-ready dashboard that tells a single, credible growth story. Kelsey White from GNW Consulting and Coral Wills from Nasdaq share how they built an integrated reporting framework using Adobe Marketo Engage, Marketo Measure, and Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition to align KPIs across teams. Discover how to identify the metrics that matter most to the C-suite, connect performance data across systems, and automate dashboards that clearly show marketing impact on pipeline, revenue, and long-term value. Explore how generative AI within Adobe tools helps surface insights faster, reduce manual reporting effort, and deliver executive-level clarity that improves forecasting and decision-making. 

    Key takeaways: 

    • Connect marketing, sales, and finance data to track ROI, pipeline velocity, and customer lifetime value in a single view
    • Simplify attribution and reporting by aligning teams around shared, executive-level KPIs
    • Use generative AI to automate executive-ready dashboards and accelerate insight delivery
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Marketo Measure, Adobe Journey Optimizer B2B Edition

      (11:30 PM - 11:45 PM IST)

    Unified Commerce for Manufacturers: One Platform, Many Brands [OS758]

    , Digital Commerce Strategist, McFadyen Digital

    , Vice President of Digital Commerce, The Middleby Corporation

    Unified commerce enables complex organizations to operate as one connected digital platform. For Middleby, a global leader in commercial kitchen equipment manufacturing, that means bringing together multiple brands under a single commerce experience without disrupting dealer and distributor relationships. Discover how Middleby Shop on Adobe Commerce connects brands, aligns channel partners, and enables B2B buyers to research, quote, and design complete commercial kitchen solutions across product lines. Learn how the team balances direct engagement with channel enablement while creating a centralized digital backbone for growth.

    Key takeaways:

    • Unify multiple brands under one commerce platform
    • Align direct and distributor channels without conflict
    • Enable complex B2B buying journeys across product portfolio
    Track: Commerce, B2B Customer Journeys
    Product: Adobe Commerce

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Unipol’s Omnichannel Insight Model with Adobe Customer Journey Analytics [CP16]

    , Insights & Analytics Practice Lead, Unipol Assicurazioni SpA

    , Principal Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    As customer expectations rise, transformation requires more than new tools — it demands a new insight operating model. Discover how Unipol leverages Adobe Customer Journey Analytics to integrate system performance, user experience, navigation behavior, ticketing, and marketing data into a unified decision-making framework. By breaking down silos between IT, digital, and marketing, Unipol has built a 360-degree view of both customer journeys and application performance. At the core of this approach is a composite Application Health Index, combining technical reliability, experiential quality, behavioral patterns, support dynamics, and campaign impact into a single actionable indicator. This model enables real-time monitoring, faster issue resolution, and stronger connections between marketing initiatives and offline operational outcomes.

    Key takeaways:

    • Building a unified omnichannel insight framework across IT, digital, and marketing
    • Creating a composite Application Health Index to align teams on shared KPIs
    • Connecting marketing investments to measurable operational and business impact
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

      (Wednesday, Apr 224:45 AM - 5:10 AM IST)

    Unlocking Customer Experience at Scale with Adobe Real-Time CDP [OS510]

    , Sr. Product Marketing Manager - Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe

    , Sr. Manager, Digital Analytics, Personalization & Marketing Technology, Air Canada

    Adobe Real-Time Customer Data Platform (CDP) has transformed how marketing and IT work together to deliver personalized, connected customer experiences across every channel. Hear how Air Canada and its teams use Real-Time CDP to unify first-party data, activate insights in real time, and power meaningful customer engagement at scale. Explore real-world use cases that show how organizations build strong first-party data strategies, operationalize audiences across channels, and future-proof their data foundation for evolving customer expectations. .

    Key takeaways:

    •    Unify first party data across teams and channels
    See how marketing and IT align around a single, real time customer profile to deliver connected, personalized experiences everywhere.
    •    Choose a CDP built for the future
    Discover the core CDP capabilities needed to support governance, scale, and cross functional adoption as customer expectations evolve.
    •    Turn real time insights into scalable engagement
    Learn how leading brands activate audiences instantly across channels to drive more relevant, timely customer interactions.

    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP

    Unlocking Productivity and Creativity ROI [S417]

    , VP, Product Marketing, Adobe

    , Sr. Consultant, Forrester

    , VP of Principal Analyst, Forrester

    Adobe Acrobat Studio is more than a productivity tool—it’s a creativity enabler that unifies document workflows, creative design capabilities, and AI-powered intelligence in one solution. Join Michi Alexander, VP of Product Marketing at Adobe, and Craig Le Clair, VP and Principal Analyst at Forrester Research, as they demonstrate how Acrobat Studio helps marketers and knowledge workers unlock both analytical and creative potential.


    In this session, you’ll learn how to streamline document workflows, enhance collaboration across teams, and accelerate business impact. You’ll also gain exclusive insights from Forrester’s Total Economic Impact™ study on Acrobat Studio, revealing how organizations save time, reduce costs, and achieve measurable ROI. Whether you’re building high-impact campaigns or collaborating across the enterprise, discover how Acrobat Studio helps you accelerate work—and create more value.

     

    Key takeaways:
    •    Discover how Acrobat Studio’s AI-powered tools unlock productivity and creativity.
    •    Learn how to automate workflows and enhance collaboration across teams.
    •    Gain exclusive insights from Forrester’s ROI study on Acrobat Studio.

    Track: Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams
    Product: Adobe Document Cloud, Adobe Express, Adobe Acrobat Studio

    Unlock Insights Faster with Customer Journey Analytics Data Insights Agent [L121]

    , Sr. Product Manager, AI/ML, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Manager, Adobe

    Turn everyday questions into instant, actionable insights with the Data Insights Agent in Adobe Customer Journey Analytics. Discover how conversational intelligence revolutionizes exploration, visualization, and understanding without the need for manual queries or dashboards. Experiment with prompts like “What did regional performance look like last year?” and see polished charts, summaries, and insights appear instantly. Learn how the Data Insights Agent uses conversational context to refine results, dig deeper into “why” questions, and reveal hidden drivers behind patterns, such as traffic spikes or revenue changes. Get a first look at upcoming innovations to help users surface, interpret, and act on insights faster. Leave equipped to elevate how your teams explore data, ask sharper questions, and make decisions confidently, and pick up prompting techniques that make any LLM interaction smarter, faster, and more targeted.

    Key takeaways:

    • Discover how natural language prompts instantly transform into rich Customer Journey Analytics visualizations, explanations, and insights
    • Master workflows that use conversational context to refine analyses and unlock deeper understanding
    • Get hands on with upcoming AI innovations that supercharge analytics with unmatched speed and clarity
    Track: Analytics
    Product: Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    Unlock More Value in Marketo Engage: 10 Features You Should Be Using Today [CP17]

    , Director of Product Marketing, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe

    , Senior Product Marketing Manager, Adobe

    We’ve launched a ton of new capabilities in Marketo Engage in the past few releases, and we know it’s hard to keep up. No time to read release notes? We’ll summarize the top 10 ways to get more value from your current subscription without paying any more. Some features use AI to speed things up, and some don’t, but all of them make you more efficient or more effective or both. Don’t go looking outside for features that you already own – check out what’s already inside Marketo Engage and get more value from your Marketo investment.

    Key takeaways:  

    • Gen AI features you might not know you have 
    • What could be holding you back from using the new features 
    • How to get help with new features from Adobe and other customers

    Using AI to Build Audiences in Adobe Real-Time CDP [L515]

    , Product Manager, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe

    , Manager, Solutions Consulting, Adobe

    This hands-on lab gives you practical experience using AI-powered capabilities in Adobe Real-Time Customer Data Platform (CDP) to build and refine audiences more efficiently. Designed as a companion to the AI and audiences strategy session, this lab moves beyond concepts and puts AI directly into action.  

    In today’s experience-driven economy, marketers must move faster while maintaining governance and trust. In this lab, you’ll work directly in Real-Time CDP to create and evolve audiences using AI-assisted workflows, including Audience Agent and Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator. You’ll see how AI can reduce manual effort, surface insights, and guide audience refinement—helping teams respond more quickly to customer behavior and business needs.  

    Through guided exercises, you’ll learn where AI adds the most value in audience workflows, how to validate AI-assisted outputs, and how to operationalize these capabilities at scale while maintaining strong privacy and governance controls.  

    Key takeaways:

    • Use AI-powered tools, including Audience Agent, to accelerate audience creation and refinement
    • Identify practical ways to integrate AI agents into everyday audience workflows
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator

    Raja Walia
    12:00 p.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Using Customer Journey Analytics for Decisions, Not Just Reporting [OS750]

    , CEO, GNW Consulting

    Many organizations implement Customer Journey Analytics expecting better reporting, only to find that decisions don’t change after go live. The platform works, the data is there, and yet teams continue to rely on the same metrics and attribution models. But beyond reporting, Customer Journey Analytics is a way to understand customer behavior over time, across channels and systems. Explore how teams move past session-based views, identify where journeys break, and analyze progression instead of isolated outcomes. Learn what Customer Journey Analytics is designed to support for executive decision-making, how it fits into modern analytics and AI strategies, and what needs to change inside the organization for Customer Journey Analytics to influence decisions.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to use Customer Journey Analytics beyond reporting
    • What types of questions Customer Journey Analytics is designed to answer
    • Why attribution-focused analytics limits journey understanding
    Track: Analytics, B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends
    Product: Adobe Analytics, Adobe Marketo Measure, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics

    Monday, Apr 20
    Velocity at Scale: How Coca Cola Deaveraged Its Content Supply Chain [S915]

    , Consulting Practice Lead | Consumer Goods & Retail Media Networks, Adobe

    , Senior Director, MarTech Operations and Enablement, The Coca-Cola Company

    , Senior Director, Global MarTech & Adtech Engineering, The Coca-Cola Company

    In a region as diverse as North America, “average” content underperforms. To authentically connect with consumers, The Coca Cola Company’s North America Operating Unit (NAOU) shifted from monolithic, one-size-fits-all campaigns to a deaveraged content supply chain, delivering high-velocity, localized, and personalized experiences at scale. 

    But how do you deaverage content without blowing up budgets or burning out teams? We unpack the 6-week proof of concept that reengineered NAOU’s creative engine from end to end. See how Adobe Workfront and Adobe Fusion orchestrated complex workflows, how Adobe Firefly Design Intelligence generated on brand localized variants in seconds, and how Frame.io and Adobe Experience Manager Assets connected production with distribution in a single, streamlined pipeline. 

    Key takeaways

    • How to evolve from a few “hero assets” to a modular, reusable content system that intelligently serves micro segments
    • How to compress feedback cycles and approvals to achieve 6-week deployment milestones
    • Methods for measuring the impact of AI-driven design on resource allocation, cost efficiency, and brand consistency across markets
    Track: Content Supply Chain for the AI World
    Product: Adobe Workfront, Adobe Experience Manager Sites, Adobe Experience Manager Assets, Adobe Firefly

    Vibe Code an Author Experience for Edge Delivery Services [L613]

    , Architect, Adobe

    , Principal Scientist, Adobe

    , Strategic GTM, Cursor

    Your authors move fast; your tools should move faster. With your trusty AI-assisted IDE and the Adobe Experience Manager Edge Delivery Services Author SDK, craft custom authoring experiences that match bespoke content workflows. You’ll start from the out-of-the-box Edge Delivery Services authoring model and then iteratively design turning prompts into vibes. Along the way, discover patterns that reduce the time to ship features that your teams will love. Get practical experience and advice on the dos and don’ts when building content for Edge Delivery Services. No Edge Delivery Services experience required — basic HTML, CSS, and JS preferred.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how to use AI and Adobe Experience Manager to quickly create high-value, low-effort author experiences
    • Use AI-assisted IDE workflows to accelerate Edge Delivery Services development while staying in control of the code
    • Gain skills that you can reuse and adapt for your own projects
    Track: Developers , Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web

    Walmart: Unlocking Creative Excellence at Scale with Generative AI [S913]

    , Retail Global Industry Strategy Director, Adobe

    , Head of Creative Strategy and Operations, Walmart

    , Group product marketing manager, Adobe

    Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is investing in the future by transforming its in-house creative organization into a people-led, technology-powered engine for innovation. Join Walmart and Adobe to learn how the team is bringing brand vision to life at unprecedented scale - modernizing enterprise workflows, leveraging Adobe Firefly generative AI, and empowering creatives to deliver high-quality, on-brand experiences faster than ever. With a vast product assortment and constant demand for Brand content, Walmart is redefining how creative excellence is produced, governed, and delivered across every channel.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how Walmart is modernizing creative operations to support millions of products while delivering consistent, high-quality brand experiences across channels
    • See how Adobe Firefly helps Walmart scale content production while maintaining brand integrity, governance, and legal confidence
    • Explore how emerging innovations - such as digital twins and generative AI for the enterprise - are shaping the future of scalable creative and experiences in retail
    Track: Workflow and Planning, From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Content Supply Chain for the AI World

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    What Changes When Customer Insight Runs Through the Creative Lifecycle? [CP7]

    , Chief Creative Officer, Code and Theory

    , Sr. Director Global Industry Strategy, Adobe

    Banks have invested heavily in unifying customer data for journey orchestration and personalization at scale. But the creative flowing through those systems? Still shaped by instinct, internal opinion, and inherited assumptions — not by the customer intelligence sitting inside the platform.

    This session introduces what becomes possible when Adobe Experience Platform moves from targeting infrastructure to creative foundation: Synthetic AI Personas built from your own AEP segments that bring customer response directly into the creative process — at ideation, at concept development, and at pre-launch — before compliance lock-in closes the window to adjust.

    We'll show how banks are using these personas not as a research step, but as an integrated layer of creative intelligence — informing which strategic direction to pursue, which messaging framework will resonate with which segment, and whether high-stakes communications will land the way you intended. In regulated industries, you don't get to optimize after launch. The creative has to be right earlier.

    The technology exists. The data exists. What shifts when customer insight shapes creative decisions for financial services organizations — not just targeting decisions — before the compliance gate closes?

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Code and Theory for marketing purposes.

    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Enterprise Productivity for High-Performing Teams

    What Happens After Migrating to Adobe Experience Manager as a Cloud Service [S704]

    , National Manager - Digital Experience and Customer Communication, Hyundai Auto Canada Corp.

    , Director, Digital Customer Experience, Bridgestone

    , SVP, KPMG International - Global Digital Marketing, KPMG

    , Senior Director, Agile Program Management, Publicis Sapient

    Migrating to Adobe Experience Manager as a Cloud Service is often positioned as a technical milestone, but the real impact shows up in how teams work, how value is delivered, and how future-ready the organization becomes. Bridgestone, Hyundai Canada, and KPMG, together with Publicis Sapient, share honest perspectives from their journeys — what broke, what changed, and what ultimately paid off. We’ll discuss how leading organizations are using migration as a forcing function for modernization, aligning people and platforms, and accelerating outcomes with proven tools and accelerators. Discover how to move beyond “getting to the cloud” and toward building what comes next.

    Key takeaways:

    • How cloud migration drives team alignment, faster delivery, and future-ready digital platforms
    • Turning modernization into measurable business impact

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Publicis Sapient for marketing purposes.

    Jonathan Whiteside
    1:00 p.m. Tuesday, Apr 21
    Tuesday, Apr 21
    When Performance Creative Stops Performing [S738]

    , Global EVP, Technology, DEPT®

    , Director, Product Marketing, Digital Experience, Adobe

    Performance teams are producing more creative than ever, yet results aren’t improving at the same pace. Asset volumes explode, workflows strain, and confidence drops as creative, media, and data fall out of sync. Scaling content usually forces a bad choice — protect creative quality and move slowly, or automate everything and lose your brand. Learn why that trade-off is false as we unpack why performance creative so often breaks at scale. Discover what we’ve learned from running high-volume performance content operations where speed actually matters. Explore a hybrid model where creative specialists design the system, and teams are empowered to run it using self-serve tools, AI-assisted workflows, and embedded governance.

    Key takeaways:

    • How to get faster execution, safer scale, and creative that still feels intentional
    • Practical tips for closing the loop between idea, activation, and results
    • How combining AI-powered tools with the right operating model turns creative volume into real performance

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with DEPT® for marketing purposes.

    Track: From Volume to Brand Value: Scaling Production-Ready Content for the Enterprise
    Product: Adobe GenStudio, Adobe GenStudio for Performance Marketing, Adobe GenStudio Content Marketing , Adobe GenStudio for Creative Production

    Where Creativity Meets AI: How Adobe Is Reinventing Marketing [S743]

    , Global Vice President of Enterprise Marketing, Adobe

    , Global Chief Creative Officer, Critical Mass

    , EVP, Global Client Lead, Critical Mass

    For decades, Adobe has been the trusted foundation for creative professionals, empowering artists, designers, and marketers to bring their visions to life. But as the marketing landscape evolves, so too must the tools that enable creativity. Hear how Adobe is bridging its storied creative heritage with the future of AI-powered marketing. Learn how Adobe Enterprise marketing and Critical Mass co-created “It starts with Adobe,” a breakthrough brand platform a decade in the making, that speaks to the AI challenge marketing teams are facing right now, not by abandoning the creativity that defined Adobe for generations but by amplifying it through agentic AI capabilities. If you're adopting AI for marketing, explore how to align your organization around outcomes to drive real business results while keeping the customer at the center.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how to use AI to drive real business results
    • Why customer-centric thinking enables successful AI implementation
    • Understand how partnerships accelerate competitive advantage

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Omnicom for marketing purposes.

    Tuesday, Apr 21
    Why CDW Chose Adobe Marketo Engage as the Foundation of Its AI Vision [OS215]

    , VP of Demand Generation, CDW

    , Director of Marketing Automation, CDW

    CDW is operationalizing its agentic marketing strategy by establishing Adobe Marketo Engage at the core of its martech stack. Leveraging AI agents to help activate audiences, CDW aims to coordinate multi-step customer journeys across channels with AEP integration. Generative AI capabilities through GenStudio are embedded into campaign workflows to accelerate content production, variant creation, and personalization at scale across the Adobe ecosystem. This approach is supported by Adobe’s centralized, data-centric real-time CDP that unifies behavioral, firmographic, and engagement data to enable end-to-end lead lifecycle management, advanced attribution, and continuous optimization across demand and revenue operations.

    Key takeaways:

    • Why CDW choose Adobe to help execute its agentic marketing campaign vision
    • Learnings on implementing an integrated Adobe stack
    • How this solution accelerated sales, revops, and go to market alignment
    Track: B2B Customer Journeys, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends

    Lee Dallas
    Wednesday, Apr 22
    9:00 a.m. Wednesday, Apr 22
    Why Your Adobe AI Needs Digital Sight to Predict User Intent [S730]

    , Global Head of Services & Solutions, Fullstory

    , Sr. Mgr; Strategic Solutions Specialists, Fullstory

    AI now powers nearly every modern digital experience, but if it’s built on traditional analytics, it will always be a static map in a dynamic world. To become truly intelligent, predictive, and human-centered, AI needs digital sight — a deep understanding of how real people behave, struggle, and succeed in digital journeys. Join Fullstory to learn how structured behavioral data — the digital sight behind every click — transforms Adobe AI from an optimization engine into a strategic partner. Learn how leading brands are moving beyond surface-level personalization to infuse their AI with intent, empathy, and foresight, allowing them to anticipate needs, build durable loyalty, and remove friction before revenue disappears.

    Key takeaways:

    • Discover how behavioral data enables your AI to not just personalize content but to predict user intent and proactively guide users toward their goals
    • Learn how enriching your AI with the “why” behind user actions closes the empathy gap, reduces friction, and impacts conversion and retention
    • Understand the framework for operationalizing behavioral data to create a continuous feedback loop that makes your entire Adobe technology stack more intelligent, effective, and human-centric

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Fullstory for marketing purposes.

    Track: Analytics, AI, Innovation, and Leadership Trends, Orchestrating Experiences with AI Agents
    Product: Adobe Target, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Marketo Engage, Adobe Experience Platform Agent Orchestrator, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics, Adobe Journey Optimizer

    11:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Monday, Apr 20
    Winning in the Agentic Web: Optimizing for LLMs and Human Experiences [OS341]

    , Group Manager - Product Marketing, Adobe

    AI-powered agents and LLMs are changing how buyers discover brands and make decisions, even before a customer visits your website. These models don’t invent information — they read, interpret, and cite what they find across the web. At the same time, human audiences still expect fast, relevant, and engaging digital experiences once they arrive. The challenge is that most digital experiences were built for humans alone, not for the agents now shaping brand visibility and influencing buyers in AI-driven channels. See how Adobe brings together Adobe LLM Optimizer and Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer to help brands optimize for both audiences, shaping how LLMs represent your brand and continuously improving engagement and conversion on owned properties.

    Key takeaways:

    • Learn how LLMs and AI agents discover, interpret, and surface your brand in AI-driven experiences
    • Understand how to influence LLM narratives while maintaining accurate, trusted brand representation
    • See how AI agents autonomously identify and deploy site optimizations to improve engagement and conversion
    Track: Brand Visibility and Content Management in the Agentic Web
    Product: Adobe Experience Manager Sites Optimizer, Adobe LLM Optimizer

    Your Data Warehouse + Intelligent Activation with General Motors [S504]

    , Principal Product Manager, Adobe

    , Sr. Product Manager, GM

    Companies need the right tools that can offer a holistic and flexible approach to their customer data strategy. Find out why CDPs and data partners co-exist for delivering great customer experiences to drive both brand-initiated and in-the-moment customer experiences at scale, leveraging zero-copy integration patterns. Learn how to select the right data management approach for your business and what you can do now to prepare for organizational success by forming a holistic view about your customer.
    Key takeaways:

    • The importance of building a long-term strategy for customer data accessibility, management, and activation 
    • How to expand access to critical data to create high-value audiences for more effective marketing
    • Minimizing data duplication to create privacy-centric and productive engagement workflows 
    Track: Customer Data Management and Collaboration
    Product: Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Real-Time CDP, Adobe Real-Time CDP B2B Edition

    Monday, Apr 20
    10:00 a.m. Monday, Apr 20
    Your Marketing Supply Chain Is 10x Too Slow [S703]

    Most marketing organisations take weeks to move from brief to activation. Content production bottlenecks. Personalisation stays manual. Marketing Ops are stretched. The gap between what customers expect and what teams can deliver keeps widening.

    Publicis Sapient's Intelligent Marketing framework was built to collapse that gap. Using agentic AI - powered by our Bodhi platform and Adobe Experience Platform, GenStudio, and Agent Orchestrator - we've helped a global CPG leader produce 700+ assets in two months with 64% AI content adoption across three brands. A leading pharmaceutical company cut content creation time by 90% across 30+ markets. A national grocery retailer shifted to personalised marketing 70% faster by combining legacy modernisation with Bodhi-powered campaign automation.

    In this session, industry practitioners move past the theory to share what's genuinely working - and what breaks when you move this fast. We'll cover how Bodhi AI agents working alongside Adobe's agents are compressing the marketing supply chain, how operating models need to change, and why identity-resolved personalisation at scale requires more than technology alone.

    If you're past the "what is AI" stage and ready for "how do we rewire our marketing operation," this is your session.

    By clicking add to schedule, I agree the Adobe family of companies may share my contact information with Publicis Sapient for marketing purposes.
